programme.title: Must Love Cats

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Stray bullets strike an elderly couples home and their neighbours are questioned. Wardens Raj Ataya and Clint Caywood rush to help an injured boater

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr Jeff and his team help two Chihuahuas found abandoned in a storm drain. The Denver vet also makes a discovery when a cats odd eating habits put its life in danger

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: A dog needs knee surgery, meaning Dr Jeff may be its only hope. Dr Nichols and Dr Petra team up to fix a cats broken elbow

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania prison offers to take 20 dogs from Villalobos. An emaciated pit bull that was left on the side of the road fights for its life

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Behaviourist Jackson Galaxy helps a couple afraid to have a child due to their hostile cat, and tries to make peace between two felines who scrap around their kitty litter

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson helps a good cat stand up to its two feline attackers. He also meets a couple fed up with their cats eating everything in sight

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete is on a treehouse holiday to the pine forest glory of Scandinavia, starting with Norways magical TreeTop Hotel and hitting the Swedish treetops

programme.title: Preposterous Pets
programme.desc: A young woman on the west coast of America experiences the night life with a pair of tamandua anteaters. Plus, the story of a couple who share their home with hippos

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: How male humpback whales can sing for several days with no vocal cords - and why they do it in the first place. Plus, how anteaters are able to eat so quickly

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: The programme examines how ostriches can run so fast, dogs ability to pick up scents underwater, and how and why fireflies glow

programme.title: Man-Eating Super Squid
programme.desc: Documentary searching for the truth behind the tales of the kraken, a monstrous killer squid that some claim has been responsible for the deaths of fishermen at sea

programme.title: Alaska: Surviving the Last Frontier
programme.desc: The group struggles to find enough food to eat, so Tim heads into the Wrangell Mountains to hunt for goats

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: The brothers-in-law Brett Raymer and Wayde King transform a disused photo booth into an aquarium for the Las Vegas First Friday street fair

programme.title: Tanked
programme.sub-title: Lifestyles of the Fish and Famous
programme.desc: A look back at the best tanks Brett Raymer and Wayde King have built for Hollywood stars, including the shark tank for Tracy Morgan and a design for flamboyant rockers Kiss

programme.title: Fish or Die

programme.title: Project Grizzly
programme.desc: Jeff Watsons unconventional hunting lessons fail to prepare Bob and Screech to hunt game in the wild - but he discovers they may be learning on their own

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: After coming closer than ever to proving the existence of Bigfoot in Oregon, the team continues their search in the mountains of Kentucky

programme.title: Man-Eating Super Squid
programme.desc: Documentary searching for the truth behind the tales of the kraken, a monstrous killer squid that some claim has been responsible for the deaths of fishermen at sea

programme.title: My Extreme Animal Phobia
programme.desc: Former wrestler Kurt comes to terms with his fear of bees, Tameeka combats her hatred of millipedes, and Shelly confronts a long-standing unease relating to sharks

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents a rundown of hits from the top 20, including Texass Summer Son, Supergrasss Moving and Alice Deejays Better Off Alone. Plus, Geri Halliwell sings Mi Chico Latino in a performance from the archives. First broadcast August 26, 1999

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents the pop chart programme, including performances from Geri Halliwell, Ocean Colour Scene, Another Level featuring Tq, A-teens, and Lou Bega. First broadcast September 3, 1999

programme.title: Hunt for the Oldest DNA
programme.desc: Film following a team of scientists in their quest to find ancient genetic material, the discovery of which could have massive implications for how the past is understood. This documentary also reveals the genes of long-extinct creatures that once thrived in warm, lush Arctic landscapes

programme.title: Fred Dibnahs Industrial Age
programme.desc: The former steeplejack examines the history of the iron and steel industries, beginning with a visit to Ironbridge Gorge in Shropshire. Fred moves on to the Black Country, where he learns how the anchor for the ill-fated Titanic was made, before getting the chance to drive the biggest steam-powered rolling mill engine he has ever seen

programme.title: Building Britains Biggest Nuclear Power Station
programme.desc: Part one of two. Following the challenges involved with building the Hinkley Point C in the remote Somerset countryside, the first new nuclear power station in Britain for a generation. This series follows the engineers, technicians, and the behind-the-scenes staff who are under pressure to keep the project on track, including building the mammoth foundations for the two nuclear reactors, and excavating cooling water tunnels out under the Bristol Channel

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents a rundown of hits from the top 20, including Texass Summer Son, Supergrasss Moving and Alice Deejays Better Off Alone. Plus, Geri Halliwell sings Mi Chico Latino in a performance from the archives. First broadcast August 26, 1999

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents the pop chart programme, including performances from Geri Halliwell, Ocean Colour Scene, Another Level featuring Tq, A-teens, and Lou Bega. First broadcast September 3, 1999

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Janice Long and John Peel present an edition first aired on 3 April, featuring performances by Big Audio Dynamite, George Michael, A-Ha, the Real Thing, Cliff Richard and the Young Ones, the Style Council and Falco

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Anthea Turner presents the edition first aired on April 11 1991. Featuring performances by the Wonderstuff, Alison Limerick, Gary Clail On-U Sound System, Mike and the Mechanics, Dannii Minogue, Madonna, Monie Love versus Adeva, Chesney Hawkes and the Shamen

programme.title: Shania Twain at the BBC
programme.desc: A collection featuring all of the Canadian singer-songwriters biggest moments from the BBC archives. Including live performances, her earliest UK TV appearances from the days of debut hit Youre Still the One, and classics That Dont Impress Me Much and Man! I Feel Like a Woman!

programme.title: Reel Stories: Shania Twain
programme.desc: The singer meets up with Dermot OLeary in a London cinema to reflect on the pivotal moments in her life and career, in a recording made ahead of her debut at Glastonbury in 2024. Shania speaks about performing on TV shows across Canada during her teenage years and recalls working as a performer at Deerhurst Resort in Ontario to support her siblings after her mother and stepfather died

programme.title: Glastonbury
programme.desc: Clara Amfo and Lauren Laverne present as Canadian country pop singer-songwriter takes to the Pyramid Stage for the famous Glastonbury teatime Legends slot, following in the footsteps of the likes of Dolly Parton, Diana Ross, Tony Bennett, Tom Jones and Kylie Minogue. Fans can no doubt expect hits including Man! I Feel Like a Woman, That Dont Impress Me Much and Youre Still the One

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: After listening to Emmets piano playing from her garden, stopping a passer-by to listen with her and rebuking Liz for collecting milk in her dressing gown, Hyacinth receives a phone call from Mrs Fortescue asking for a lift into town

programme.title: Sorry!
programme.desc: Timothy asks his sister to help in his bid to leave his henpecking mother. Assisted by Timothys best friend Frank, they escape, but soon his parents give chase and freedom seems unlikely

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Janice Long and John Peel present an edition first aired on 3 April, featuring performances by Big Audio Dynamite, George Michael, A-Ha, the Real Thing, Cliff Richard and the Young Ones, the Style Council and Falco

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Anthea Turner presents the edition first aired on April 11 1991. Featuring performances by the Wonderstuff, Alison Limerick, Gary Clail On-U Sound System, Mike and the Mechanics, Dannii Minogue, Madonna, Monie Love versus Adeva, Chesney Hawkes and the Shamen

programme.title: Shania Twain at the BBC

programme.title: Reel Stories: Shania Twain
programme.desc: The singer meets up with Dermot OLeary in a London cinema to reflect on the pivotal moments in her life and career, in a recording made ahead of her debut at Glastonbury in 2024. Shania speaks about performing on TV shows across Canada during her teenage years and recalls working as a performer at Deerhurst Resort in Ontario to support her siblings after her mother and stepfather died

programme.title: The Great British Year
programme.desc: Documentary following British wildlife through the seasons. Spring marks a series of beginnings, as trees explode with blossom and mornings fill with the chorus of birdsong. Long-tailed tits frantically build nests, a stoat mother hunts rabbits to feed her playful young, while in the oceans, seahorses sway to a graceful courtship dance. As spring becomes summer, guillemot chicks leap from their cliffs to begin life at sea. Narrated by Joseph Fiennes

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: Chairman Leonard Sachs welcomes Georgia Brown, Barry Cryer, Katinka Seiner, John Inman, Barry Howard, Marie-Ange Brillet and the Three Hurricanes to the stage of the City Varieties Theatre, Leeds. First shown in 1975

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: At the behest of a local businessman, unlikely manhunter Hetty fearlessly sets out in search of the thugs responsible for attacking Asian businessmen. She soon discovers that every victim has been a restaurant owner, but then Hetty herself becomes a target of the gang involved

programme.title: Hidden Assets
programme.desc: ONeill is hospitalised due to exposure to medical waste. Police raid haulage company KYV, where ONeill worked as a driver on Pearses recommendation. Forensic accountant Norah, suspects Nick owed the 27 million euros to Pearse and discovers a contract between KYV and Tar Le involving hazardous waste transport. In English and Spanish

programme.title: Hidden Assets
programme.desc: Tipped off, Pearse diverts the truck, but the police seize the drugs as they are being unloaded, while Niamh admits Tar Le used KYV to remove waste, but denies knowledge of the drug smuggling. Alice reveals a financial connection between Pearse and Tar Le, allowing Norah to link Pearse to the Liechtenstein account. Niamhs attempts to safeguard the future of Tar Le land her in legal trouble. In English and Spanish

programme.title: Parkinson
programme.sub-title: Julian Lloyd Webber, Andrew Lloyd Webber and Tim Rice
programme.desc: An edition of the chat show from 1978 in which Michael Parkinson is joined by lyricist Tim Rice, composer Andrew Lloyd Webber and cellist Julian Lloyd Webber

programme.title: The Great British Year

As spring becomes summer, guillemot chicks leap from their cliffs to begin life at sea. Narrated by Joseph Fiennes

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: A look ahead to the latest forecast

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: A feud is brewing in the meerkat enclosure - and its a family affair. To try to bring them together and allow them to work out their pecking order, keeper Charlie has a plan. Meanwhile, a lion turns 18. Presented by Ben Fogle, Kate Humble, Hamza Yassin and Megan McCubbin

programme.title: Farm 999
programme.sub-title: Badger Baiters Tracked and Race Against Wildfire
programme.desc: In Northern Ireland, a devastating wildfire tears through the Glens of Antrim, threatening farmland, homes and livestock. As flames spread across the hills, the fire service battle to save buildings, animals and livelihoods. With a drone team and the Irish Air Corps called in, it becomes a race against time to stop the blaze before it consumes everything in its path. In Richmond, North Yorkshire, police close in on a brutal gang of badger baiters, after a tip-off from a local Rural Watch group leads officers to a car full of suspects and a horrific crime scene

programme.title: SAS: Catching the Criminals
programme.desc: Ex-SAS leader Billy Billingham is out on the beat with Cleveland Police, as they seek violent offenders and crack down on antisocial behaviour in the community

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.sub-title: Celebrity Special with Martel and Alex Jones
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell shows TV host Alex Jones around a rather cramped flat in Londons Shepherds Bush. Martin Roberts explores the programmes archive, spotting a Chelsea pad that cost an eye-watering amount even 10 years ago. Dion Dublin visits a Manchester property where a familiar face is looking to spruce it up with the help of his family

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles presents a compilation edition focusing on motoring memorabilia, with items including a vintage stop sign that brought an Oswestry team to an abrupt halt and a duo in Essex who used magic to drive down the price of a luxury car mascot. Eric journeys along the Time Road exhibition at the British Motor Museum and in the Cotswolds, Christina Trevanion goes for a spin at one of Britains most historic racing circuits

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The visit of Princess Margaret to Kembleford is jeopardised when a school caretaker is found murdered. It falls to Father Brown to resolve matters and save the royal occasion from being cancelled. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a couple from a town in Cheshire to find their dream home on Anglesey. During a busy week of house-hunting, Jules turns his attention away from property and heads to the Welsh mainland to catch up with a passionate farmer, Gareth Wyn Jones, whose family has been working the land for 375 years

programme.title: I Made It at Market
programme.desc: After welcoming them to his life-changing business bootcamp in the spring of 2022, Dominic Chinea checks in with blacksmith Alex from Northumberland and woodturner Lucinda from Wiltshire. He hears about their amazing success and what their skills are earning them now

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene host the quiz in which Brian, Caroline, Monique, Ryan and Ayotunde race in moving podiums across the studio floor to try to win £5,000. The contenders battle across a series of fast-paced qualifiers and head-to-head races where the aim of the game is simple - to make it to the finish line before their rivals. The winner then races against the track itself in an attempt to win the cash prize

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Tom Allen host the quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for a cash prize

programme.title: BBC News at Six; Weather
programme.desc: The latest headlines

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: JB Gill and Alex Jones present the usual mix of celebrity guests and stories about people in extraordinary circumstances

programme.title: Extraordinary Portraits
programme.desc: The comedian matches wildlife sanctuary owner Lindsay with celebrity artist and animal lover Ricky Wilson, but the Kaiser Chiefs frontman faces an artistic dilemma. Lindsay wants the portrait to focus on the animals she has dedicated her life to, but Ricky believes it is Lindsay who is extraordinary and should be at the centre of the painting

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: When the team attend a Dark Morris Dancing event, Margo finds herself at the centre of a crime when a member of her team collapses during their performance. With a severe allergic reaction to blame, and the victims epi-pen case empty, Humphrey is stumped as to how the attack was triggered unseen while all eyes were on the stage. Death in Paradise spin-off, starring Kris Marshall and Felicity Montagu

programme.title: Have I Got News for You
programme.desc: Monty Don hosts, with guest panellists comedian Chris McCausland and journalist Helen Lewis joining team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop to delve into the latest news

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: The lads decide its time to expand their empire in Cork city, as their days of doing all the hard work are over - they plan on being the bosses now. Starring Alex Murphy and Hilary Rose

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: A round-up of todays headlines

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: Claudia is joined by Oscar-nominated star of Schindlers List, Ralph Fiennes, who is on the sofa to talk about his play Grace Pervades. Comedy actress Anna Faris returns to the world of Scary Movie for the next instalment in the spoof-horror franchise. Olivia Cooke, star of Amazon Primes The Girlfriend, talks about the upcoming series in the Game of Thrones prequel, House of the Dragon, and comedian Michelle de Swarte tells Claudia about her stand-up tour The Afters

programme.title: Something in the Water (2024)
programme.desc: A group of five friends must fight for their lives in open water after a dream wedding turns into a nightmare. Shark-survival thriller, starring Hiftu Quasem, Natalie Mitson, Ellouise Shakespeare-Hart and Nicole Rieko Setsuko

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus sports reports, weather forecasts and arts and entertainment features

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Live
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt is joined by chefs John Chantarasak, Niklas Ekstedt and Thomasina Miers, and by special guest Jack Savoretti. Helen McGinn picks the wines to go with the studio dishes

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Roo Irvine hosts this episode from an antiques fair in Detling, Kent. With help from Irita Marriott and Nick Hall, the teams scour the stalls for the most profitable items

programme.title: Football Focus
programme.desc: Alex Scott and guests look ahead to the weekends matches, including Chelsea v Manchester City. Plus, news from the lunchtime game between Arsenal and Bournemouth

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: Womens Six Nations
programme.desc: Sarra Elgan looks ahead to the tournament, catching up with some of the biggest stars of last years World Cup and finding out about their hopes ahead of the competition, as well as looking at their challenges away from the pitch

programme.title: Live Womens Six Nations
programme.desc: England v Ireland (Kick-off 2.25pm). All the action from both teams opening match of the championship, held at Allianz Stadium Twickenham. England have won this title in each of the last seven years and were also crowned world champions in 2025. They claimed a 49-5 victory when these sides met in Cork in last years competition, though they only led 7-5 at half time

programme.title: Final Score
programme.desc: Jason Mohammad presents a round-up of the results and this afternoons news from the Premier League, EFL and Scotland

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local News from across Northern Ireland with Tara Mills and Declan Harvey

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: Celebrity Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp presents a celebrity edition of the high stakes quiz, with a team of athletes featuring Kriss Akabusi, Sammi Kinghorn, Matt Baker and Gladiator Karenjeet Kaur-Bains playing for charity. They must cross the Bridge by stepping on the truths and avoiding the lies, earning money for each correct answer

programme.title: Blankety Blank
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts the comedy quiz show in which a panel of six celebrities fill in the missing blanks and help win some brilliant prizes for some very lucky contestants. This week, he is joined by Richard Ayoade, Alex Jones, Stephen Bailey, Nadia Jae, Gyles Brandreth and Roisin Conaty

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: Jonathan Ross hands over his phone for the starriest game of Send to All, Chris and Rosie Ramsey are rudely awakened for a Midnight Gameshow, and Nile Rodgers and Chic surprise some karaoke-singing members of the audience with special renditions of his classic hits, before they raise the roof with a spectacular performance.

programme.title: The Weakest Link
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan hosts a special edition featuring four pairs of celebrities. DJ Tyler West and actress Molly Rainford, Mollie Pearce and Harry Clark from The Traitors, Goggleboxs Stephen and Daniel Lustig-Webb, and The Repair Shops Suzie Fletcher and Brenton West will need to work together as a team - but each round, one player will be voted off

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: A rapidly deteriorating Kim struggles to keep her secrets and avoid spiralling out of control as the ED faces a make-or-break CQC inspection that could mean losing major trauma status for good. The day of the inspection is complicated further when two children and their father are rushed in .Siobhan prepares to confront Chris Banfield, only to get caught up in a prison lockdown

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee brings home a battered box from the tip only to discover a second-hand sex doll inside but where he sees a profit Lucy only sees a manky mannequin and wants it gone from the house. Reluctantly, Lee does as hes told, not realising what hes dealing with

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Highlights of the latest Premier League matches, including Arsenal v Bournemouth at Emirates Stadium and Brentford v Everton at Gtech Community Stadium. A brace from Declan Rice helped the title-chasing Gunners to a 3-2 away win over Bournemouth in January and they will have had high hopes of picking up another three points. The Bees and Everton are both chasing European places and it was Brentford who came out on top in the reverse fixture, with Igor Thiago scoring a hat-trick in a 4-2 triumph. Plus, Burnley v Brighton and Hove Albion and Liverpool v Fulham

programme.title: The Football Interview
programme.desc: Kelly Somers has a conversation with Aston Villa and England striker Ollie Watkins

programme.title: Legend (2015)
programme.desc: Biopic of the Kray brothers, exploring their rise to power in the London underworld and conflicts with rival gangs from the point of view of Reggies wife Frances, who remains devoted to her husband even as he remains equally bound to his brutal, unstable sibling. Starring Tom Hardy as both twins, with Emily Browning, Christopher Eccleston and David Thewlis

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: Claudia is joined by Oscar-nominated star of Schindlers List, Ralph Fiennes, who is on the sofa to talk about his play Grace Pervades. Comedy actress Anna Faris returns to the world of Scary Movie for the next instalment in the spoof-horror franchise. Olivia Cooke, star of Amazon Primes The Girlfriend, talks about the upcoming series in the Game of Thrones prequel, House of the Dragon, and comedian Michelle de Swarte tells Claudia about her stand-up tour The Afters

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Dean Westmoreland is presented with pair of pointe shoes worn by former ballerina Julie Felix for her landmark performance at the Royal Opera House, and Charlotte Abbott fixes a model Range Rover that represents a big globetrotting adventure by a six-man military team. Chris Shaw takes on a fragile 1917 scrapbook documenting the rise of the groundbreaking Dick Kerr Ladies, the munitions factory football team who became global pioneers of the womens game

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: A look ahead to the latest forecast

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Its the day of the election, and Femi prepares to take on Cheddar. With a lot riding on his success, Femi recruits the help of a reluctant Toby, who is dealing with his own crisis. Omar has a daring plan, while Leah is pulled away from Benjamin by a struggling Felix

programme.title: P Diddy: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: Yinka Bokinni investigates how Sean Combs has gone from being the worlds biggest hip-hop mogul to haemorrhaging money, businesses, friends and fans in a matter of months. Yinka will examine how Combs made it to the top, and what some may have turned a blind eye to along the way. Speaking to some of Combs inner circle, and biggest critics, Yinka will find out what they think about him and ask why so many are only speaking out now

programme.title: Teen Predator/Online Killer
programme.desc: The case of an online catfishing abuse incident, which saw a 20-year-old suspect accused by a 12-year-old girl in Scotland. The suspects bail conditions were supposed to prevent him from accessing the internet, but he very quickly was the subject of a second accusation from New Zealand, with online activity traced back to his house

programme.title: Teen Predator/Online Killer
programme.desc: Police re-arrest Alexander McCartney after discovering thousands of images of child abuse on his electronic devices and a multi-agency international investigation begins when the US Department of Homeland Security learn of two more catfishing victims. With McCartney due in court to plead guilty to charges of making indecent images of children and blackmail, the case takes a turn when an obituary page for one of his victims is found

programme.title: Teen Predator/Online Killer
programme.desc: Police connect the suicide of a 12-year-old girl in West Virginia to Alexander McCartney, opening a manslaughter investigation but in order to charge him they have to prove he foresaw the risk to her life. The case sets a new legal precedent in the UK and more than five years after the investigation began, McCartney is finally convicted and sentenced

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Sports mockumentary about GB Paralympian Darren Silverstone, who stole the hearts of a nation before his infamous chokey-o in Tokyo. For the first time, he tells his story - and starts his glorious comeback

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall returns to find the deadliest animals in Australia, focusing on saltwater crocodiles, snakes and the box jellyfish

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit: Vengeance Most Fowl (2024)
programme.desc: After a recent crime wave hits gardeners across the region, Wallace and his pre-programmed smart gnome, Norbot, are the main suspects. While the inventor proclaims his innocence, its up to faithful hound Gromit to battle sinister forces. Despite being locked up for his previous crimes, a certain penguin might have something to do with recent events. Animated adventure, with the voices of Ben Whitehead, Reece Shearsmith and Peter Kay

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Commissioner Selwyn Patterson struggles in the wake of his shock shooting, and the local community is rocked by a murder at a care home when a game of bingo gets horribly out of hand. But could someone really kill over something so trivial? As the case takes on a series of jaw-dropping twists and turns, Neville and the team realise that this case is so much more than it first appeared on the surface. Hayley Mills guest stars

programme.title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds and Snakes (2023)
programme.desc: Coriolanus Snow, a young man who will go on to become the tyrannical ruler of the Panem civilisation, is assigned to mentor a contender in the 10th ritual games. He finds himself torn between his feelings for his protegee and the opportunity to turn his familys failing fortunes around. Sci-fi adventure prequel, with Tom Blyth, Rachel Zegler, Viola Davis and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Funboys
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in Ballymacnoose
programme.desc: Following a gas leak at his flat, Callum moves in with Lorcan and his father Sammy, widely regarded as Ballymacnooses biggest rotter. Driven by a desire to no longer be a pushover and in a desperate attempt to get over his break-up with Gemma, Callum goes under Sammys wing and unleashes his own inner swine. Meanwhile, Jordans two fathers are finally tying the knot and he becomes wrapped up in all the excitement of the wedding. Comedy, with Ryan Dylan and Rian Lennon

programme.title: Funboys
programme.desc: With Callum now unwelcome at Boggins farm and his flat still out of bounds because of a gas leak, he turns once more to his oldest, dearest friend, Jordan. Things seem to be going well - Jordans two fathers show Callum some much-needed sympathy and introduce him to the foreign concept of talking about his feelings. Unfortunately this new-found bond doesnt go down so well with the other member of the house - Jordan. Meanwhile, Gemma brings home a pet and unwittingly causes Lorcan to relive some very painful memories. Comedy, with Ryan Dylan and Rian Lennon

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Its the final exams, and everyone is feeling the pressure. Leah is stressed that Felix will drag her down, but things are about to get a lot worse for them both. Toby makes a big play to try and cling on to his Cambridge offer and keep Abby. Femi is threatened by Cheddar, but Pixie helps him fight back. On the pitch, the hockey girls face their rivals, while Omars secret whips up the tension

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Its nearly time for the boarders to say goodbye to St Gilberts. Femi is forced to choose between love and ambition, Omar finally tries to right his wrongs, and Toby makes a life-changing decision. With only one exam left to go, Leah cracks under the pressure. Can her friends bring her back from the brink? Final episode of the sitcom

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: An aspiring comedian must choose between sanitising his set and embracing his voice after a controversial performance results in further gigs being cancelled

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May test-drive an Aston Martin DBS Convertible, a Ferrari California and a Lamborghini Gallardo Convertible through Romania, searching for the mountain highway built during the reign of the countrys former dictator Nicolae Ceausescu - allegedly the best road to drive on in the world. Actor Eric Bana is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Clara have ended up with a couple of extra young companions. Their first trip in the Tardis brings them to an abandoned theme park planet, now home to a shabby showman, a chess-playing dwarf and a dysfunctional army platoon. However, beneath the surface, an army of Cybermen lies waiting to be awakened. Warwick Davis, Tamzin Outhwaite and Jason Watkins guest star

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Short film about four very different schoolgirls thrown together as they plan their escape from detention. Written by and starring Sabrina Ali

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Clara receives a psychic message from Madame Vastra and River Song that sets the Doctor on a journey to the one place in time and space he must never go - the planet where he will one day die. An old enemy lies in wait in the Doctors tomb, plotting an apocalyptic revenge, while the answers to the mystery surrounding Clara is finally uncovered, along with the Doctors darkest secret. Guest starring Alex Kingston and Richard E Grant

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Animated sketch comedy following the residents of a quiet suburban street that quickly becomes a playground for comic mayhem-absurd, awkward, and unexpectedly hilarious

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison and Mike are forced to cosy up to Barclay if their plan to sell some land to the golf consortium is going to work. Alison is involved in a silent negotiation of her own - she has designs on Lady Buttons bedroom but cant quite muster the courage to ask her outright if she would consider relocating. The ghosts become fixated on solving the mystery of Kittys death. Supernatural comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Martha Howe-Douglas

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: When a teenage boy has a girl over for the first time, the overly attached monster under his bed has a meltdown. Comedy short film, starring Freddie Meredith

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: The ghosts are officially bored, and Pat comes up with new entertainment for the gang. Mike and Alison host their international buyer at Button House in order to confirm the land sale, but Mikes antics threaten the whole deal - can he pull it back in time? Humphrey is offered a fresh perspective on his strained marriage and finally learns some French, with a little help from a most unexpected source

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Brothers Steve and Stu scramble to put on a last-minute birthday show for Steves daughter. If they fail, Steves in the doghouse and Stu might end up dead. Comic short film, written by and starring Stuart McPherson and Stephen Buchanan

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Brendan OCarroll returns as Agnes Brown, the loudest, proudest woman in Ireland. Without even leaving the house, the doting mother-of-six becomes a podcast sensation, as Cathy is horrified to discover her parent accidentally hijacking her new online venture. Simon Delaney guest stars, with Jennifer Gibney

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Animated comedy set in 1990s east London. Joyces birthday present has been stolen, so her husband enlists the help of his fearsome mother-in-law to track it down

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Theres trouble brewing in Finglas as Grandad drops a bombshell - hes planning to leave. Agnes is having none of it and immediately goes into detective mode to find out whats really going on. Meanwhile, Foleys Bar prepares for its big annual talent show - and Winnie is determined to take part. Between Grandads secrets and some highly questionable talents, its another week of unpredictable mayhem for Agnes and her long-suffering clan. Comedy, co-written by and starring Brendan OCarroll

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Animated sketch show set in Belfast, where the cats get stoned, the pigeons get philosophical and Gambo forgets how to breathe

programme.title: Funboys
programme.desc: Three childish young men try to navigate through the hardships of life. Life is good for the funboys until Callum gets his first-ever girlfriend and the change in dynamic threatens both their friendship - and Jordans life. A burgeoning relationship means that Callum no longer wants to play video games all weekend with the fellas. This proves too much for the others to bear. Comedy, with Rian Lennon and Ryan Dylan

programme.title: Sin City: The Real Las Vegas
programme.desc: Part one of two. Tir Dhondy reveals the realities behind modern Las Vegas. The first episode explores the risk of crime faced by tourists and visits a pool party where massive screens show scores of live sports events from around the world so that partygoers can bet from the comfort of their sun lounger

programme.title: Funboys
programme.desc: Gemma and Lorcan throw a party, but Gemma finds one of her old personality quirks coming to the fore again as she struggles to maintain her identity amidst the intoxicating brew of Lorcans old-fashioned country charm. Callum makes a new friend in Gemmas brother David, but finds theres a catch. Comedy, with Rian Lennon, Ryan Dylan and Ele McKenzie

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: It is the day of Janet and Jonnys wedding, but the bride and groom are locked in the back of a van surrounded by a breakfast of dressed crabs and baked beans. While they ponder whether it was ever meant to be, Gaz comes up with a plan to rectify the situation - he and Donna will get married, but sign their friends names on the register

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Gaz reacts to the misery of Donna leaving him by binge eating. Jonny gets a job working in the pub, while his house receives a much-needed tidy, courtesy of Louises group of teenage delinquents - who provide Janet with an opportunity to work on developing that all-important maternal instinct

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet struggles to remember things, so Louise signs her up for a pub quiz to keep her mind active. However, she gets wrapped up in the competition and forgets her antenatal class - prompting Gaz to accompany Jonny in her place. Comedy, starring Sheridan Smith

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Gaz is run over by an ambulance, making Donna realise she still loves him. However, while concussed, he confesses to being the father of Janets baby - which sends a furious Jonny storming off to the maternity ward in search of answers. Meanwhile, Louise worries about her career prospects

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny feels neglected as Janet focuses all her attention on the baby, and he resorts to desperate measures to get her to notice him. Donna flaunts her new-found financial success, but refuses to share the wealth with her friends, while Louise cannot understand why the others have no time for her. Comedy, starring Ralf Little

programme.title: Barra on the Foyle
programme.desc: Barra Best travels along the Foyle river network, criss-crossing his way across the many rivers and streams that make up its great catchment

programme.title: Kegworth: Flight to Disaster
programme.desc: Survivors and eyewitnesses recount the moment British Midland Airways Flight 092, travelling from London to Belfast, ran into difficulties in January 1989. The Boeing 737-400 crashed onto the motorway embankment between the M1 and A453 near Kegworth, Leicestershire. Rare archive footage and expert analysis uncovers the chain of decisions that sealed the fate of 47 passengers and injured dozens more

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: London and South East England: Main and Dessert
programme.desc: The remaining three chefs from London and south-east England cook mains and desserts. Their creations are judged by veteran judge Aktar Islam. Dishes include 28-day dry aged duck inspired by 28 Days Later and a peanut and salted caramel parfait that serves as a tribute to the BAFTAs

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: Under pressure from her mother, Mary weighs up an unconventional offer from Mr Ryder. As she grapples with what she truly wants, Lizzy and Mr Collins help her to chart her own course. But just as she thinks shes taken her future into her own hands, a surprise visit from her aunt and uncle leaves everyone reeling

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Clive Myrie looks at the health benefits of press-ups. He meets Cardiff business owner Shalize, who is concerned about her familys history of type 2 diabetes. Clive suggests that if she does press-ups on a regular basis, the science shows they could reduce the risk of diabetes, lower blood pressure and even help her live longer

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson meets a couple who have spent a few decades in Australia, but have decided to swap the surf and sunshine for the lovely views and charm of Cornwall. He also visits an abandoned slate quarry that has been transformed into an extraordinary off-grid retreat, full of creativity and coastal magic

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Zoe Ball, Roman Kemp and Clive Myrie show how small, everyday changes can boost wellbeing, from dancing to lift your mood to enjoying mackerel for a healthier heart. In the first episode, Clive prescribes a diet of oily fish for a woman on a mission to supercharge her health after shedding weight with the help of weight loss drugs

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Sheffield empty nesters Siva and Dhami are feeling stuck in a rut so Roman Kemp arrives to shake things up - literally. He shows them how taking up dancing could do far more than just put a spring in their step. Research reveals that adding dance to a weekly routine could boost fitness, increase brain power and lift a persons mood. Will a little rhythm rewrite their whole routine?

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts a game show in which contestants compete for the chance to win £10,000, with a single impossible answer knocking them out for the day

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: Eight players do battle in the knockout quiz. Only one will be left standing at the end, hoping to reach the Golden Run and double their money. Hosted by Alex Scott

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Comedian Zoe Lyons hosts a quick-fire quiz in which six contestants compete across six rounds testing their general knowledge, quick thinking and speedy reactions

programme.title: Clive Myries Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: The newsreader goes on a trip to reconnect with family, explore his heritage and experience the rich mix of cultures that makes island life so special. Clive begins by meeting up with his sister and exploring the wild beauty of eastern Jamaica, encountering descendants of rebel mountain communities, visiting a high-altitude coffee farm, learning the secrets of jerk pork and bedding down 100ft above the Caribbean Sea

programme.title: Natures Epic Journeys
programme.desc: Documentary following a thousand elephants as they come together in a crucial gathering in northern Kenya, while facing threats from both predators and poachers. Liz Bonnin and a team of scientists and filmmakers use cutting-edge tracking technology to follow individual elephants as they cope with daily challenges and make the most of this unique, short-lived gathering. They also capture surprising new behaviour and witness how the elephant society responds to poaching, including the way in which young elephants cope with the loss of their parents

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel presents from Haywards Heath in West Sussex, where a ventriloquists dummy makes an appearance after 30 years in a box, and an innocent-looking, silver-topped walking stick proves to contain two feet of deadly Toledo steel. Expert Christopher Payne also reveals a table that could have been worth more if it had been made on the right side of the Atlantic

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Compilation edition revisiting some of the historic venues from the series and offering some new valuations and unexpected auctions. Paul Martin visits Rodmarton Manor, an extraordinary Arts and Crafts house in the Cotswolds

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Michael Ball, Jodie Prenger, Laurence Rickard and Snoochie Shy test their general knowledge skills before the days winner, and the weeks overall victor is revealed

programme.title: Ronan Keatings Wild Atlantic
programme.desc: Ronan completes this leg of his journey along Irelands Wild Atlantic in County Derry/Londonderry. He walks the 400-year-old walls of the city of Derry/Londonderry with comedian Diona Doherty. He also hits the farm to find out what it takes to be a competitive sheep herder, before heading for the windswept coastline of Castlerock to meet a skilled craft worker who builds traditional coracle boats by hand

programme.title: Greatest Gardens with Diarmuid Gavin and Carol Klein
programme.desc: A search for Northern Irelands finest gardens, with Diarmuid and Carol joined by guest judge Prue Leith for the first edition. They visit Fernhill Garden in Ballynahinch, Co Down, which is filled with more than 4,000 plants, before heading to Co Antrim for a suburban garden in Jordanstown and a six-acre farmhouse garden near Crumlin

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: The team looks ahead to summer days in the garden, with Lizzie Schofield pruning and planting in her sitooterie area, while Brian Cunningham has a beginners guide to starting a productive vegetable plot. Lizzie reveals which varieties of tomatoes she has picked for 2026 and is also the first of the team to start work on her competition garden, based on planting that appeals to one of the senses

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Frances Tophill returns to Damson Farm, and shares research from the RSPB on how to support garden birds. She also reveals how to make the most of sowing older seeds, and gets hands-on preparing vibrant container displays ready for the sunny days ahead. Toby Buckland explains how to make the most of outdoor spaces. And Joe Swift travels to the Cornish coast to meet a gardener who proves that even the wildest seaside weather cant stop a true planting paradise

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: A new generation of big cats is coming of age. First-time lion mum Seramis tiny cubs surprise the crew and could mark a split in the Xudum pride. Its time for Mathata and the oldest cubs in the pride to pull their weight. Pobe the cheetah makes a welcome return with her surviving cub Bo, and he finally shows the team what hes made of

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.sub-title: Gina Yashere, Lost Voice Guy, Ed Gamble
programme.desc: Gina Yashere comperes the comedy show at Londons Hammersmith Apollo. She warms up the audience before introducing routines by 2018 Britains Got Talent winner Lost Voice Guy and former Mock the Week regular Ed Gamble

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Analysis of the days events with Nick Watt

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: Tenet (2020)
programme.desc: A troubleshooter is hired for a high-stakes mission to prevent armageddon. As he navigates through a world of espionage, Protagonist uncovers a shadowy organisation with the ability to manipulate time. Racing against the clock, whichever way its ticking, he must master the concept of inversion to thwart the catastrophic future. Christopher Nolans mind-bending fantasy action thriller, starring John David Washington, Kenneth Branagh and Elizabeth Debicki

programme.title: One Fine Morning (2022)
programme.desc: Working as a freelance interpreter, single mother Sandra lives with her eight-year-old daughter in Paris. As she comes to terms with the painful deterioration of her father, who is suffering from a rare form of dementia, she runs into Clement, an old friend, and they embark on an affair. Romantic drama, starring Lea Seydoux. In French and German

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: London and South East England: Judging
programme.desc: The two highest-scoring chefs from London and south-east England must go head-to-head and cook their six-course menus again. Actor Simon Callow helps decide the winner from the two remaining chefs. Andi Oliver presents

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: A new generation of big cats is coming of age. First-time lion mum Seramis tiny cubs surprise the crew and could mark a split in the Xudum pride. Its time for Mathata and the oldest cubs in the pride to pull their weight. Pobe the cheetah makes a welcome return with her surviving cub Bo, and he finally shows the team what hes made of

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: Mary joins the Gardiners in the Lake District, hoping for clarity and calm. She reconnects with Mr Hayward, and they bond over poetry and nature. But just as it seems as though they might finally declare their feelings for one another, Mr Ryder arrives to disrupt proceedings, with Caroline Bingley in tow

programme.title: Global Eye
programme.sub-title: Inside Chinas Schools for Rebellious Teens
programme.desc: A look at Chinese disciplinary schools promising to fix problem children at a devastating cost, and a report on how girls In India are challenging the practice of child marriage

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Brinicle invites his friends round to taste his brioche, but it is chewy and hasnt risen at all. Despite this, Brinicle announces he has entered a baking competition

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: When Dad begins sleepwalking, Cosima and Big Lizard follow him to discover why

programme.title: The Weasy Family
programme.desc: Weasy hits a ball out of bounds while playing baseball and it lands on a scarecrow, which frightens the ducklings

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: Much to Trevors irritation, a rare phoenix woodpecker takes a liking to him, so he demands an immediate quest to return the bird to its real home

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings play marbles, and its driving Grizzy crazy

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: Duck has a job punting tourists along the waterways, but bored Frog thinks he can do a better job. Thanks to Frogs interference, the pair wind up going on a wild trip down the rapids.

programme.title: Game on Grandparents
programme.desc: The winning teams return to the arena to take on Mario Kart in the Grand Final. Who will win the competition and claim the Game on Grandparents trophy and GOAT title?

programme.title: Bros in Control
programme.desc: Adam and Joe enter a gaming world and embark on a quest to unearth treasure before attending Sharkys very chaotic party

programme.title: Gladiators: Epic Pranks
programme.desc: Nitro and scientist Maggie Aderin team up for an out-of-this-world space prank on Comet featuring wind machines, cosmic rubber chickens and an unexpected meteor shower

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall heads to Timor-Leste in Southeast Asia in search of the blue whale, and also hopes to find a saltwater crocodile, one of the giants of land

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: Current affairs reports aimed at a younger audience

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Frances Tophill returns to Damson Farm, and shares research from the RSPB on how to support garden birds. She also reveals how to make the most of sowing older seeds, and gets hands-on preparing vibrant container displays ready for the sunny days ahead. Toby Buckland explains how to make the most of outdoor spaces. And Joe Swift travels to the Cornish coast to meet a gardener who proves that even the wildest seaside weather cant stop a true planting paradise

programme.title: Pilgrimage
programme.desc: Diversitys Ashley Banjo, actresses Hermione Norris and Patsy Kensit., reality star Tasha Ghouri; stand-up comedians Hasan Al-Habib and Ashley Blaker and broadcaster Jayne Middlemiss make a journey through the landscapes of north-east England to Lindisfarne, one of Britains most important pilgrimage sites. They trek through the heart of Northumberland and the Scottish Borders along a curated network of trails celebrating three of Englands most revered seventh-century northern English saints - Hild, Oswald and Cuthbert

programme.title: Pilgrimage
programme.desc: The celebrities continue their adventure in Durham and visit the 12th-century Norman cathedral, where Canon Charlie Allen introduces them to the ancient pilgrim tradition of foot washing. They then head for Heavenfield, an ancient battlefield, and Housesteads near Hadrians Wal, the UKs best-preserved Roman fort

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: London and South East England: Starter and Fish
programme.desc: Four chefs compete for London and south-east England with canapes, starters and fish dishes. They are judged by veteran judge, Michelin-starred chef and former banquet fish course winner Aktar Islam. Their dishes include a Paddington-inspired take on savoury marmalade and a stuffed poached brill with a Vesper martini broth in a nod to Casino Royale

programme.title: Live Challenge Cup Rugby League
programme.sub-title: Hull Kingston Rovers v York Knights 11.04
programme.desc: Hull Kingston Rovers v York Knights (Kick-off 1.30pm). Coverage of the quarter-final at KCOM Craven Park. Rovers won this competition for the first time in 45 years in 2025 and went on to win the Super League. However, York upset them in their first ever Super League game in February, prevailing 19-18 at LNER Community Stadium

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Paul Martin presents from Southwell, near Nottingham, where experts Caroline Hawley and Mark Stacey assess antiques and collectibles brought in by members of the public. Paul also finds out how Southwell Minster has had a cavalcade of historical figures pass through the doors, from Cardinal Wolsey to Charles I, at some dramatic moments in British history

programme.title: Live Womens Six Nations
programme.desc: Wales v Scotland (Kick-off 4.40pm). Coverage of the final match in the opening round of fixtures, held at Principality Stadium. Scotland claimed a narrow 24-21 home win when the teams met in this competition last year, as well as a more convincing 38-8 victory in Salford in the World Cup last August. The Scots also prevailed 20-18 on Welsh soil in 2024, but Sean Lynns side will be eager to end that run of defeats this time around

programme.title: My Hero
programme.desc: The comedy actress pays tribute to Eric Morecambe, telling his story by retracing his steps, visiting the places he appeared with partner Ernie Wise, meeting people who knew him and introducing the performances that made her want to enter the comedy world. The journey takes her across Britain, from Wales - where she talks to writer Eddie Braben, the man behind many of Eric and Ernies most famous TV moments - to the Essex studio of the artist who painted the entertainer at the height of his fame

programme.title: The Morecambe and Wise Show
programme.sub-title: The Morecambe and Wise Show 1970 - The Lost Tape
programme.desc: A complete episode of the comedy duos show that had been considered lost for more than 50 years, but was discovered in an unmarked film can in 2020 by Eric Morecambes son Gary. Now it has been restored and can be enjoyed in full for the first time since being first broadcast on October 8, 1970. Aside from classic sketches, there is music by Paul Anka, Patricia Lambert and Kenny Ball and his Jazzmen, with Eric and Ernie themselves rounding things off with a burst of Bring Me Sunshine

programme.title: McCartney: The Hunt for the Lost Bass
programme.desc: The disappearance of Paul McCartneys original Hofner bass more than 50 years ago is one of rock n rolls great mysteries and this documentary tells the story of the instrument and the quest to find it. Featuring interviews with the former Beatle, his brother Mike, musicians Klaus Voormann and Elvis Costello, and roadies, journalists and fans who embarked on a mission to return the bass to its place in music history

programme.title: Paul McCartney at the BBC
programme.desc: A compilation of TV appearances from the musicians post-Beatles career, featuring performances of songs including Band on the Run, Jet, Coming Up and Live and Let Die on programmes from Top of the Pops to the Electric Proms. There is also rarely seen backstage footage and interviews, as well as appearances by a range of familiar faces, including a recent encounter with die-hard Beatles fan Bob Mortimer

programme.title: Sings the Beatles
programme.desc: A look back through the BBCs archives at memorable covers of classic Beatles songs. Included are a performance of Day Tripper by Sandie Shaw, Shirley Basseys version of Something, the Carpenters rendition of Help!, Oasiss reinvention of I Am the Walrus, and Joe Cockers chart-topping interpretation of With a Little Help from My Friends. Plus, Paul McCartneys solo performance of Lady Madonna

programme.title: Forensics: The Real CSI
programme.desc: In the early hours of a Saturday morning a woman calls 999 to report that she had been attacked and raped by a stranger in a public phone box in Birmingham. Crime scene co-ordinator Jo Ward directs a detailed examination of the phone box for any evidence that may help police identify the attacker, with an investigation being launched by West Midlands Polices specialist Rape and Serious Sexual Offences team, led by Detective Inspector Emma Watson

programme.title: The Capture
programme.desc: Carey and Pierson escape into a network of underground tunnels. Unarmed and with no back-up, Carey is horrified by what Pierson has been through, and the extent of the conspiracy that they are both now entangled in. Simons real identity is revealed as allies above ground piece together the truth, and Carey forges an uneasy alliance to bring down the forces truly responsible for Isaac Turners murder

programme.desc: The top 10 locations around the world that just might be hiding alien bases, including a cavern beneath the ice of Antarctica, a lake in China that is a hotspot for UFOs, and a pyramid under the slopes of Mount Denali

programme.desc: Experts investigate footage of a van hurtling out of control across a roundabout, narrowly avoiding pedestrians, before smashing into a car. A concentrated jet of fire shot out its side, sending a ribbon of flame dozens of feet across the street

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: An invasion of Burmese pythons is decimating the Florida Everglades, with entire species of animals being wiped out. These pythons have no natural predator to stop them, so to combat these serpents the state has created the Python Elimination Program. King of the Swamp Troy Landry, his sharpshooting son Chase, legendary gator hunter Bruce Mitchell, and big fish wrangler Zak Catchem join forces with professional snake hunter Bill Booth to dive deep into the underbelly of the Everglades to capture these sinister beasts. Here, Troy teaches partner Pickle Wheat python hunting, while Bill and Tes Lee work together to put a dent in the growing python population

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ten of historys most compelling - and covert - projects that study the UFO phenomenon. programme.sub-title: The Search for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Throughout history many have sought the lost Ark of the Covenant. According to the Old Testament God himself instructed Moses to build the Ark - and it is believed that it held the power of the Almighty. The presenter explores how such a coveted religious artifact could just disappear and whether it is possible that the Ark could ever be found

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Orb and Crash Debris, KGB UFOs and Aliens and Superhuman Reflexes

programme.desc: A photograph of a UFO hovering over Holloman Air Force Base in New Mexico and a cabin built in a supposedly anomalous spot that defies gravity in the Redwood Forests. Plus, the origin of frightening howls recorded in Witset, British Columbia

programme.desc: Documentary series exploring anomalies appearing on satellite images to try and get a better understanding of unexplained phenomena

programme.desc: The CIAs ML-Ultra programme sought to create mind control methods through unethical human experimentation. Experts investigate classified documents that reveal the horrible atrocities that were carried out in the name of national security. Narrated by Jamie Theakston

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.sub-title: Christ and the Crucifixion: The Real Evidence
programme.desc: A look at the historical evidence of Jesus? crucifixion, from the realities behind the legend, to piecing together what is known for certain and what is missing. programme.title: Forbidden History

programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as singer Paul Young, Olympic gold medallist Jade Jones, Strictly professional Aljaz Skorjanec and comedian Arthur Smith pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Joel Dommett, Joanna Page, Armando Iannucci, Kumail Nanjiani and Amy Gledhill leave their dignity at the door to take part in the comedy challenge show. They begin by hunting for a small creature, serving Taskmaster Greg Davies his fruit and vegetables and trying to catch a golden T-shirt - all under the watchful eye of Alex Horne

programme.title: Sky Coppers
programme.desc: The hunt is on for a man who has assaulted an officer and dragged them along with his car before escaping. Sergeant Keith Bennet and PC Chris Turton search for a motorbike thief hiding in a wood in the dead of night. After reports come in of a man loitering in gardens in Birmingham, the team find out not everything is as it seems

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of the owners of Hannah and Masons, a French bistro in Cranbury, New Jersey. Members of staff complain their pay cheques bounce, and the kitchen cooler is so unhygienic that Gordon makes the decision to close the restaurant on Valentines Day - the busiest night of the year

programme.title: Countdown (2019)
programme.desc: When a young man arrives in hospital after a car accident, claiming to have an app on his phone that predicts the time of a persons death, nurse Quinn and her colleagues decide to download the app for themselves. Things soon turn ugly when Quinn discovers that, according to the countdown app, she only has three days to live. With the clock ticking and a mysterious figure haunting her, she must find a way to save herself before time runs out. Horror, starring Elizabeth Lail

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Its the final, and just one hunt stands between the four remaining players and a prize of up to £100,000. But the last hunt comes with a fiendish twist and big-money challenges, meaning the players must deploy every ounce of skill, speed and determination to stay in the game

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In north Devon, artist Steve Pleydell-Pearce veers off from his normal coastal hotspots for Spekes Mill Mouth Waterfall, hoping to capture the grandeur and majesty of the landmark. Steeplejack Andrew Tarplee takes on an ancient church tower in the village of Paul in Cornwall, where he abseils down the 800-year-old tower to repair and repaint its clock faces, protecting them from the ravages of time

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect meets art deco fan Ododu, whos downsized to a Victorian terrace in Brighton but is at a loss about how to connect the kitchen to the garden. For inspiration, he visits Eltham Palace, a showstopping example of deco glamour. George also heads to Stockport, Greater Manchester, to help Sarah, who has just inherited the home she grew up in following her mothers death. With a new baby on the way, shes trying to make the 1890s red brick home work for modern family life, while still preserving some of the features that remind her of her mum

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The bar-room staff and regulars are bequeathed $100,000 by a former customer, but their new-found wealth soon causes friction. Classic comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla asks Sam to be her plus one for her ex-husband Nicks wedding to his glamorous new flame, but Sams appearance makes Nick so jealous that he begs Carla to take him back. Comedy, with Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam regrets letting Diane talk him into asking Norm to sort out his taxes. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra comes down with a bad case of flu and takes to her bed, forcing Ray to look after her and the kids. Unfortunately for him, a meeting with a star quarterback complicates matters. Guest starring Terry Bradshaw

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray becomes envious of Roberts good looks and decides the time has come to get a head-to-toe makeover, complete with fake tan. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.sub-title: Don Juan in Hell - Part One

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Don Juan in Hell - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As he contemplates ending his relationship with Claire, Frasier finds himself plagued with advice from past girlfriends. Featuring guest appearances by Kelsey Grammers former Cheers co-stars Shelley Long and Bebe Neuwirth

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne is furious to learn Niles is counselling an attractive female patient who is nursing an obsession of her own, while a chirping cricket drives Frasier to distraction. American comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin prepares for his first nights work as a security guard, and while the gang agonises over who will be landed with walking Eddie, he recalls his traumatic last day as a policeman. To add to their problems, Daphne and Niles each buy a ticket to rival concerts on the same night

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

Can the chef break Toms iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole visit the Cotswolds, where they unearth a mystery item that looks like a fish tank, but turns out to have a very different use entirely

programme.title: Countdown
