programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth jets off to Spain to help childhood sweethearts Sue and Albert from Chatham, Kent, find their perfect holiday home. The pair first discovered Benalmadena on the Costa del Sol five years ago and instantly fell in love with it, so much so that theyve been back 10 times and now intend to buy a holiday home where they can spend time with their family. Lee lines up five great options for their budget of £190,000. Will Sue and Albert love any of them enough to make an offer?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A very important guest visits Paul and Fionas villa in France, while couple Summer and Ashley take on even more work in Italy. In Portugal, Louise and Shay look for a new start

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Kathryn and Steve battle to revive their collapsing 14th-century kitchen at Château dAzerat. At Château de Seguenville, Becky and Mark push hard to complete grandad Georges gîte in time for his 80th birthday

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine and Jon reach the final phase of their renovation as the basement transformation nears completion. But they need to start on the kitchen if they want all the work to be done in time for their summer party. And, in an attempt to escape the dust and noise, the couple take a day trip to the local Roman baths, only to find more mud there too

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Reporter Anja Popp is in Nigeria, home to one of the worlds most prolific film industries, to meet the women risking their livelihoods and reputations to push boundaries on screen

programme.title: Battle of the Brands
programme.sub-title: Primark vs John Lewis: Battle of the Brands
programme.desc: Kate Quilton explores how department store John Lewis, long-time pillar of middle-class UK, famed for wedding lists and its much talked-about Christmas adverts, has found itself battling against cut-price upstart Primark, with its hit homeware ranges and viral beauty dupes. As wallets tighten, people want a cheap pick-me-up - a lipstick, a quirky mug, a cosy blanket - and these two giants of the high street are going all out to deliver

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: More hopefuls enter the restaurant looking to find the perfect match. Twenty-seven-year-old yoga instructor Nicole meets Matthew, a 24-year-old mindfulness coach. While they seem like the perfect combination for love, how will Nicole, whos only ever dated older men, react to finding out that Matthew is younger than her?

programme.title: Jerry and Marge Go Large (2022)
programme.desc: A couple discover a mathematical loophole in the Massachusetts lottery and win millions to revive and rejuvenate their small town. Comedy drama based on a true story, starring Bryan Cranston, Annette Bening, Rainn Wilson and Larry Wilmore

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, where the three owners regularly come into conflict as they each try to assert their authority over the business, causing confusion for all. When one of the trio stubbornly resists the changes the Scottish chef is hoping to implement, sparks begin to fly

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Worcestershire, where friends Geri Atterbury and Lorraine Rigby invite guests to stay at Greenways of Malvern. On arrival, couple Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are not impressed by the wild wallpaper, and the lack of an en-suite dismays mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Royal Forester at Bewdley in Worcestershire for their second stay, with proprietors Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker hoping to impress their guests with a trip to a local safari park. Sarah and Luke are impressed with their colourful room, but Sanjeev and Elinor have a hairy experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: From Ferry Lodge in Holyhead, Anglesey, where mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway hope to impress the other contestants. However, things do not get off to a good start when Geri and Lorraine are overwhelmed by the number of laminated signs, Sean and Maxine begrudge paying 50p for toiletries and Sanjeev and Elinor are left unimpressed by the cleanliness of the establishment

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Partners Sanjeev Bhagotra and Elinor Roberts welcome their guests to Court Colman Manor, Bridgend, Glamorgan. Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are pleased with the size of their room on arrival, but Sarah Allaway discovers a collection of cobwebs in hers. During the afternoon, the groups take a lesson in fire-making, and the next morning a traditional Welsh breakfast is not to everyones taste - with the hosts wondering whether tactical voting has played a part come feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet one last time to find out what they have been paid. Geri kicks off proceedings by demanding to know why Sarah and Luke did not want a return visit to Greenways of Malvern, before they in turn confront Sanjeev and Elinor over their low cleanliness score for Ferry Lodge. Then the Court Colman Manor proprietors accuse Sarah and Luke of unfairly judging their hotel, before the payments are revealed and the winners are announced

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp makes colourful recycled candles and a fun painted pebble game with her sons, and demonstrates how to make loo roll animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in Greater Manchester compete in the culinary challenge - caravan enthusiasts Jane and Colin, party-loving Rachel and Dave, and Martyn and Russell who host a night with sparkle. In order to win the £1,000 prize some of the hosts pull out all the stops - with desserts even arriving via zip wire

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Dougs parents come to stay while Carrie is on a business trip, but insist on treating him like a kid. Arthur designs a new type of screwdriver and manufactures thousands of them when a hardware store shows an interest. Comedy, starring Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug is pleased when Carrie starts having a drink with her colleagues every evening, because it takes her mind off his new diet. After she falls out with her pals, however, he begins providing her with alcohol at home, hoping he can keep her relaxed behaviour going a little longer. Comedy, guest starring Lou Ferrigno, with Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: The Heffernans eagerly look forward to a high-school reunion, but Doug hates Carries new sensible hairdo and wants her to change it for something a little sexier. But telling her without hurting her feelings proves harder than expected. Kevin James stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray discovers the stone in Debras engagement ring is a fake, and decides to get it changed without telling her - only to learn afterwards that she had beaten him to the punch and had her grandmothers $15,000 diamond put in. Meanwhile, Robert decides to surprise his new girlfriend with a change of hair colour

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones cable TV goes on the blink, leaving them with a large amount of time on their hands - which they fill by playing games. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debras accusation that Ray is pessimistic stirs him into adopting a more positive outlook, but the rest of the family is not impressed by his change in attitude. Figure skater Katarina Witt guests stars in the comedy, with Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz goes on a date with a dustman, while Niles reminisces with Daphne about his childhood, and Frasier throws a party for the staff at the radio station in a bid to improve his image. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles has too much to drink at a Halloween party, and Frasier is taken aback to discover the children in his complex are afraid of him. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Domestic disharmony causes chaos in Frasiers apartment, leaving Martins beloved chair ruined and the carpet soiled. Meanwhile, Roz begins piano lessons. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and Jane Leeves

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer shakes off the shackles of his traditional lifestyle after hitting it off with his trendy new neighbours, who are the ultimate in cool - although Marge isnt too keen on the hipster clan, especially their parenting style. However, when Bart falls out with one of his new friends kids, the doughnut-loving dad soon sees them for what they really are. With the guest voices of Portlandia stars Fred Armisen and Carrie Brownstein, and Patton Oswalt (Young Adult)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer doesnt seem to care when Santas Little Helper goes missing, puzzling the rest of his family who are all panicking about their missing pooch. So Grampa shares a story about his son, a certain childhood pet and a more youthful but no-less-bitter Mr Burns

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip to an amusement park ends in disarray, prompting Homer to question the behaviour of his fellow man - and leading to an invitation for him to join a survivalist group preparing for the end of the world. As usual, its left to Marge to talk some sense into her hubby. Featuring the guest voice of music legend Tom Waits

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield Elementary is threatened with closure over poor test scores, until it is revealed that one student missed the exam and could potentially save the school with an above-average mark. Unfortunately, that pupil turns out to be Bart - can he pull it out of the bag?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: After a long renovation, novice hosts Tom and Terry have a trial run for their vegan BandB in Spain, while test guests are also expected at Summer and Ashleys place in Italy. A busy summer season comes to a close for Paul and Fionas villa in France while, in Portugal, dreamers Louise and Shay find out if they can make it all a reality

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB battle begins in Seaburn, Sunderland, where friends and business partners Mia and Emmanuel run the Mayfield Hotel, where the decor splits the guests opinions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are in Gateshead to visit the Sutherlands Hotel. Hugh and Loretta are in awe of the decor but Mia and Emmanuel are determined to dig up some dirt. There are surprising revelations over drinks in the evening before an impressive breakfast the next morning but the feedback leaves Heather and Paul with more questions than answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third stay of the week is at Brampton Dales Farm in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire. The guests are unimpressed by some squeaky furniture but charmed by the furry welcome. Hugh and Loretta treat the BandBers to an afternoon out at an old jail, making the farm look like a palace in comparison

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Valley View in Pendle, Lancashire, where sisters Sharon and Deby hope to get the BandBers onboard with the glamping experience. The spectacular views are universally admired, but the accommodation proves divisive, with Hugh comparing his glamping pod to a student flat

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Mia and Emmanuel from the Mayfield Hotel want to clean up Heather and Pauls cleanliness comments, before they find themselves under the microscope for the exact same reason. Hugh and Loretta are keen to throw back the covers on Sharons sleep worries, before Sharon and her sister Deby reveal they didnt take too kindly to their digs being compared to a student flat

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help Ruth and Ken from Caterham, Surrey settle their debate over their three-storey town house. Since their children have flown the nest, the home isnt right for them anymore and Ruth is ready to sell but avid DIYer Ken wants to stay and thinks with some touch ups their home could still be the place for them

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts (2023)
programme.desc: In 1994 New York City, an ex-serviceman accepts a job to steal a sports car. The high-end vehicle turns out to be a robot in disguise, who propels him into the midst of a hunt for a precious Transwarp key. The device will allow Autobot leader Optimus Prime and his mechanised compatriots to return home to Cybertron. Fantasy prequel, starring Anthony Ramos and Dominique Fishback

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle (2017)
programme.desc: Four teenagers play a jungle-themed game on an old console, only to find themselves transported into the game and transformed into its heroic characters. They must embark on a death-defying journey through the games wilderness setting to make it back to the real world, or be stuck as video game characters forever. Fantasy action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.title: No Hard Feelings (2023)
programme.desc: Faced with the possibility of losing her mothers house, a woman called Maddie answers an advert from a married couple, who are offering a Buick Regal car to anyone willing to date their introverted 19-year-old son Percy before he attends college. Maddie promises to bring the teenager out of his shell. Comedy, starring Jennifer Lawrence and Andrew Barth Feldman

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Joel Dommett, Joanna Page, Armando Iannucci, Kumail Nanjiani and Amy Gledhill leave their dignity at the door to take part in the comedy challenge show. programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Birmingham couples compete to host the best dinner party and win a cash prize. Amanda and her husband Anthony kick off the competition with an ambitious menu, before its the turn of festival lover Oli and his girlfriend LC, who prepare a vegetarian menu for their guests. However, their evening is tainted by Anthony, who upsets several of the guests with an untoward remark. Civil partners Steve and Sean try to put the weeks tension behind them as they focus on winning the cash prize

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect explores an arts and crafts-inspired house in Surrey. Built in the 1920s, it has tall chimneys, leaded windows, gabled ends and a steeply pitched roof. Sadly, it has Artex everywhere and incorporates some dubious design alterations. He sets out to help its owners turn it back into an elegant home for themselves and their three children. George also tackles a suburban home that has so many layers of wallpaper that peeling them back is like going back through a time warp

programme.sub-title: Primark vs John Lewis: Battle of the Brands
programme.desc: Kate Quilton explores how department store John Lewis, long-time pillar of middle-class UK, famed for wedding lists and its much talked-about Christmas adverts, has found itself battling against cut-price upstart Primark, with its hit homeware ranges and viral beauty dupes. As wallets tighten, people want a cheap pick-me-up - a lipstick, a quirky mug, a cosy blanket - and these two giants of the high street are going all out to deliver

While they seem like the perfect combination for love, how will Nicole, whos only ever dated older men, react to finding out that Matthew is younger than her?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Royal Forester at Bewdley in Worcestershire for their second stay, with proprietors Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker hoping to impress their guests with a trip to a local safari park. programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Partners Sanjeev Bhagotra and Elinor Roberts welcome their guests to Court Colman Manor, Bridgend, Glamorgan. Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are pleased with the size of their room on arrival, but Sarah Allaway discovers a collection of cobwebs in hers. During the afternoon, the groups take a lesson in fire-making, and the next morning a traditional Welsh breakfast is not to everyones taste - with the hosts wondering whether tactical voting has played a part come feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet one last time to find out what they have been paid. Then the Court Colman Manor proprietors accuse Sarah and Luke of unfairly judging their hotel, before the payments are revealed and the winners are announced

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Dougs parents come to stay while Carrie is on a business trip, but insist on treating him like a kid. Arthur designs a new type of screwdriver and manufactures thousands of them when a hardware store shows an interest. Comedy, starring Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug is pleased when Carrie starts having a drink with her colleagues every evening, because it takes her mind off his new diet. Comedy, guest starring Lou Ferrigno, with Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: The Heffernans eagerly look forward to a high-school reunion, but Doug hates Carries new sensible hairdo and wants her to change it for something a little sexier. But telling her without hurting her feelings proves harder than expected. Kevin James stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray discovers the stone in Debras engagement ring is a fake, and decides to get it changed without telling her - only to learn afterwards that she had beaten him to the punch and had her grandmothers $15,000 diamond put in. programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones cable TV goes on the blink, leaving them with a large amount of time on their hands - which they fill by playing games. Ray Romano stars

programme.desc: Domestic disharmony causes chaos in Frasiers apartment, leaving Martins beloved chair ruined and the carpet soiled. Meanwhile, Roz begins piano lessons. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and Jane Leeves

programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer shakes off the shackles of his traditional lifestyle after hitting it off with his trendy new neighbours, who are the ultimate in cool - although Marge isnt too keen on the hipster clan, especially their parenting style. However, when Bart falls out with one of his new friends kids, the doughnut-loving dad soon sees them for what they really are. With the guest voices of Portlandia stars Fred Armisen and Carrie Brownstein, and Patton Oswalt (Young Adult)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer doesnt seem to care when Santas Little Helper goes missing, puzzling the rest of his family who are all panicking about their missing pooch. So Grampa shares a story about his son, a certain childhood pet and a more youthful but no-less-bitter Mr Burns

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip to an amusement park ends in disarray, prompting Homer to question the behaviour of his fellow man - and leading to an invitation for him to join a survivalist group preparing for the end of the world. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield Elementary is threatened with closure over poor test scores, until it is revealed that one student missed the exam and could potentially save the school with an above-average mark. Unfortunately, that pupil turns out to be Bart - can he pull it out of the bag?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: After a long renovation, novice hosts Tom and Terry have a trial run for their vegan BandB in Spain, while test guests are also expected at Summer and Ashleys place in Italy. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB battle begins in Seaburn, Sunderland, where friends and business partners Mia and Emmanuel run the Mayfield Hotel, where the decor splits the guests opinions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are in Gateshead to visit the Sutherlands Hotel. Hugh and Loretta are in awe of the decor but Mia and Emmanuel are determined to dig up some dirt. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third stay of the week is at Brampton Dales Farm in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire. The guests are unimpressed by some squeaky furniture but charmed by the furry welcome. Hugh and Loretta treat the BandBers to an afternoon out at an old jail, making the farm look like a palace in comparison

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Valley View in Pendle, Lancashire, where sisters Sharon and Deby hope to get the BandBers onboard with the glamping experience. The spectacular views are universally admired, but the accommodation proves divisive, with Hugh comparing his glamping pod to a student flat

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Mia and Emmanuel from the Mayfield Hotel want to clean up Heather and Pauls cleanliness comments, before they find themselves under the microscope for the exact same reason. Hugh and Loretta are keen to throw back the covers on Sharons sleep worries, before Sharon and her sister Deby reveal they didnt take too kindly to their digs being compared to a student flat

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help Ruth and Ken from Caterham, Surrey settle their debate over their three-storey town house. programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts (2023)
programme.desc: In 1994 New York City, an ex-serviceman accepts a job to steal a sports car. The high-end vehicle turns out to be a robot in disguise, who propels him into the midst of a hunt for a precious Transwarp key. The device will allow Autobot leader Optimus Prime and his mechanised compatriots to return home to Cybertron. Fantasy prequel, starring Anthony Ramos and Dominique Fishback

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle (2017)

Fantasy action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect explores an arts and crafts-inspired house in Surrey. Built in the 1920s, it has tall chimneys, leaded windows, gabled ends and a steeply pitched roof. George also tackles a suburban home that has so many layers of wallpaper that peeling them back is like going back through a time warp

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.desc: Friends and Family Week exposes insecurities and deepens divides, with one bride feeling ambushed by her grooms mates - and a reminder of his ex makes things even worse

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Roller-hockey enthusiast Luke Jarvis is given £12,000 to plan his wedding to family-oriented bride-to-be Jaydene Coomber, coming up with a skating-themed ceremony that is all about fun, and a three-day stag party that blows a significant hole in his budget. However, his fiancee is hoping for a much more muted affair, namely a traditional service at the same church where her parent and grandparents got married, and it remains to be seen how shell react to strapping on roller-skates to glide down the aisle

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Holiday park entertainments manager Mathew Hill plans a pirate-themed ceremony for his wedding to dancer fiancee Jamie-Lee Johnson, who simply wants a traditional day and to be the centre of attention for once. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: In a first for the restaurant, mum and daughter Maria and Charlotte arrive for a double date. Maria meets Steve, a divorced 46-year-old builder who has a saucy way with the ladies, while Charlotte is a single mum looking for a man to heal her broken heart. Thirty-year-old academic Dan is matched with cancer cell biologist Jemma from north London, and other diners include long-distance lorry driver Paul who meets Brummie rocker Rozie

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics judge Britains Got Talent - will it be a yes or now for the return of the hit talent show? They also share their thoughts on Baby Reindeer, Red Eye, Love Triangle, In with a Shout and The Yorkshire Vet, as well as an item about bras on This Morning and a news item on seagulls. From April 2024

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Self-confessed ladette Lucy is on the hunt for the love of a good woman, having already met a male forensic investigator last year in the First Dates restaurant. Terry from east London, who has become comfortable living the single life, with his love for the horses and football leaving precious little time for romance, is in danger of blowing his chances with jeweller and widower Lisa when he goes into a bit too much detail about his solo interests

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverlys first murder mystery party takes a surprising turn, and Erica struggles to pick a major

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Pops falls asleep at the movies, Adam worries that his cool grandpa may finally be slowing down. Beverly drags Erica into a contract dispute with her cookbook publisher

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell learns a valuable life lesson when Murray, a former resident of the house, shows up unexpectedly. Meanwhile, the Dunphys old neighbour-turned-tech-titan Kenneth comes to visit with a big surprise for Phil, and Mannys dad Javier shows up with a big opportunity for his son

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Thrill junkie Lee plans to push his unadventurous bride Aimee to the extreme with a wedding that would send most brides over the edge. While Aimee wanted to play it safe with a picturesque traditional event, Lee hopes shell take a leap of faith to be his wife

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: Four Australian teams take on four international teams whove previously competed in their own countries - the USA, Denmark, Germany and France. Hamish Blake hosts, while Ryan Brickman McNaught mentors and guides the contestants. In the first challenge, they have 14 hours to build a creation that looks cool while smashing through an ice field, and thats strong enough to withstand breaking through the ice

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: After an overnight flight, the remaining racers arrive in Langkawi, off the west coast of Malaysia. Its an island paradise, but it tests the teams physically and mentally. First, they must either take to the skies in search of an eagle or deliver a tray of cocktails via a stand-up paddleboard. A challenge to replicate fruit baskets for local resorts levels the playing field and a wrong turn sends a fan-favourite team packing

programme.title: Patrick (2018)
programme.desc: A young womans chaotic life becomes more complicated when she inherits her grandmothers dog. Comedy, starring Beattie Edmondson, Ed Skrein, Jennifer Saunders and Cherie Lunghi

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: After finding himself in another love triangle, Kit wants answers, but Jazz and Inga arent even sure what those answers are. The two newest power couples in Chelsea, Zeyno and Arman, and Elys and Freddy, go on a double date. Also, the sibling rivalry heats up - Jules older brother Philip has opened his mouth one too many times and landed her in hot water

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Its time for the third Commitment Ceremony, but with couples in crisis and dinner party tensions still simmering, emotions erupt cataclysmically as two marriages come to an end

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Friends and Family Week exposes insecurities and deepens divides, with one bride feeling ambushed by her grooms mates - and a reminder of his ex makes things even worse

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond and judges Cherish Finden and Paul Hollywood are joined in the tent by Alex Brooker, Ambika Mod, Rose Ayling-Ellis, Vicky Pattison and Sam Thompson. The celebrity bakers must make mini rolls and syrup sponge puddings, and recreate the most iconic outfits theyve ever worn in choux form

programme.title: Toy Story 3 (2010)
programme.desc: Woody, Buzz and the other toys accidentally end up in a daycare centre when their owner grows up. At first this seems like the perfect new home for them, but when they realise the dangers lurking under the surface, they begin to formulate an escape plan. Pixar animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack, Michael Keaton and Ned Beatty

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family is recruited and brainwashed by a religious cult - except for Marge, who resorts to desperate measures to snap the others out of it

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After seeing Spike Lees Do the Right Thing, Adam makes a misguided attempt to end racism in Jenkintown. Geoff is horrified to learn that Erica has no moral compass

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Pop-Pop shocks everyone by offering to pay for a family cruise. And during her first Hanukkah with the Schwartzes, Erica realises that they are not as perfect as they seem

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil pays a visit to his dad to make sure he is okay after hearing some concerning news about him. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch some of their old childhood memorabilia, which prompts them to revaluate a long-held memory of their first family vacation

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Former boxing champ and groom-to-be Jordan plans a fight-night wedding in front of thousands of people, but his fiancee Danielle dreams of a girly and intimate wedding day

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell learns a valuable life lesson when Murray, a former resident of the house, shows up unexpectedly. Meanwhile, the Dunphys old neighbour-turned-tech-titan Kenneth comes to visit with a big surprise for Phil, and Mannys dad Javier shows up with a big opportunity for his son

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: In one last family trip, everyone heads to Paris so Jay can accept a lifetime achievement award for his work in the closet industry, but his old enemy Earl Chambers finds a way to haunt him. Meanwhile, Claire has a secret rendezvous and Cams lifelong dream of performing as Fizbo on the streets of the French capital is about to become a reality

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part edition, Gordon Ramsay heads to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, an Italian restaurant run by sisters Rita and Lisa. The pair grew up working at their fathers eatery nearby, but when they opened their own business, they couldnt replicate his success, and they now blame their failure on everything from the weather to the tablecloths

programme.desc: Beverlys first murder mystery party takes a surprising turn, and Erica struggles to pick a major

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Manny prepare for their first school dance, but the rest of the family seems more excited by the occasion. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cameron worry when Lily begins biting other children in the playground. Comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire becomes a neighbourhood vigilante in the hope of stopping a motorist who has begun speeding through local streets. Jay teaches Manny to ride a bike, before discovering Gloria also needs lessons, while Mitch and Cameron befriend zany stranger Barry. Guest starring James Marsden (X-Men)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer turns coach when Bart excels at computer game competitions, but when Lisa tries to bring her dad back to reality her plan causes complete chaos

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An all-female reboot of Krustys show leads Bart to join a group of protesters who commit crimes against the patriarchy

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisas music teacher is horrified when Lisa is poached by the director of the Capitol City Philharmonic for his youth orchestra, but Homer and Marge struggle with funding her

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The first guests in the 20th series get off to a rocky start when 39-year-old Craig drops the bombshell that he has three children - all with different mothers. Avid gamer Olivia feels she needs to play down her interests when on dates, and hopes to meet someone who will accept them, while dog lover Billy is troubled to discover her date has tattoos of 40 peoples names

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the conclusion of Gordon Ramsays visit to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, he confronts sisters Rita and Lisa with an ultimatum, and finds himself stuck in a war between the waiters, chefs and owners over who is to blame for the Italian restaurants failings

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend - but when he starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously, Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, the Rev Lovejoy. Meanwhile, the dry cleaners mistakenly swap Marges wedding dress for one of Krustys clown costumes. With the guest voice of Edward Norton

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge encourages Bart to explore his creative side and signs him up for piano lessons, but the youngster is less than enthusiastic about the prospect until he meets his Russian teacher Zhenya. Meanwhile, Homer is distraught after losing his last two hairs and becoming completely bald. Guest starring the voices of Jane Krakowski, Bill Hader and Justin Bieber

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell and Cameron seek legal guardians for Lily and begin secretly assessing their family members. The duos decision is made difficult, however, when they catch Jay dishing out tough love to Manny, and find out that Clare has been taking Luke to a child psychologist due to his lack of development

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Gloria hope to spend time with their children outdoors, but their plan backfires. Meanwhile, Phil witnesses an unexpected moment of weakness from Jay. American comedy, starring Julie Bowen, Sofia Vergara and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Dance Moms: A New Era
programme.desc: The Big Apple plays host to some big drama at Nationals, with a soloist freezing under pressure and Kaeli reaching her breaking point

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa bids to save the reputation of Springfields first female inventor, while Marge and Homer begin to suspect that Bart might be a sociopath

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In a parody of Richard Linklaters film Boyhood, this episode is a coming-of-age story chronicling Barts life from the age of six to him becoming a fully accomplished young man. His tense relationship with Homer is catalogued, as is the fact that he is overshadowed by the more successful Lisa at every turn. These factors shape his personality and his future more than he realises

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: You Wont Believe What This Eps About: Act 3 Will Shock You!
programme.desc: All of Springfield is outraged when Homer is accused of leaving Santas Little Helper locked in a hot car

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer takes Ned Flanders advice and starts praying regularly, hoping God will lend a sympathetic ear and make it possible for him to buy a better home. Marge warns that his materialistic attitude may incur divine retribution, but he turns a deaf ear - until a flood of biblical proportions hits Springfield

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)
programme.desc: Pete Maverick Mitchell returns to the Top Gun Instructor programme, where he must confront his past as he trains a group of younger pilots for a deadly mission. Among them is the son of Mavericks deceased best friend, Lieutenant Nick Goose Bradshaw. Director Joseph Kosinskis Oscar-winning action drama, starring Tom Cruise, Jennifer Connelly, Miles Teller, Val Kilmer, Bashir Salahuddin and Glen Powell

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The gang goes on the infamous sociology and geography field trip to Swanage, during which Neil tries his hardest to avoid the advances of over-friendly teacher Mr Kennedy. Meanwhile, Will takes a shine to new girl Lauren - but she is only interested in Simon. Comedy, starring Simon Bird

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is unhappy about being forced by Mr Gilbert to take a work experience job at a garage due to a mix-up that sees Neil joining a newspaper. Meanwhile, Jay sorts out a placement for himself and Simon at his fathers plant hire company. Starring Simon Bird and Blake Harrison

programme.desc: The chef visits West Yorkshires biggest rhubarb-growing area and cooks his favourite dessert - rhubarb crumble. He also visits the home of JB Priestley, learns a new recipe for lamb karahi in Bradford, and prepares rabbit pie following his mothers recipe

programme.desc: The celebrated seafood chef travels to the Peak District to visit his favourite formal vegetable garden at Chatsworth House, before crossing the River Severn to sample the delights of Wales, including cawl, Welsh black cattle, Conway mussels and salt marsh lamb

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver continues to present quick and easy recipes. In this edition, he prepares flashy fish stew with saffron sauce and garlic bread, before making seared Asian beef, best noodle salad and ginger dressing

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Chef Jamie Oliver prepares more quick meals, including fish baps, mushy peas and tartare sauce, plus mushroom farfalle with blue cheese and a hazelnut and apple salad

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: American chef and cookbook writer Ina Garten shares the secrets of pie-making with her friend Michael, in exchange for some floristry magic

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: American chef and cookbook writer Ina Garten is joined by her friend, bread guru Eli Zabar. For lunch she makes fennel and garlic shrimp, perfect to eat with Elis country bread.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: As bread week arrives, the remaining home-bakers must face three tough tasks set by Paul Hollywood. For the signature bake, the contestants make a sweet dough with a twist, and in the technical they must face baking without an oven. Finally, for the showstopper, they are challenged to use three different flours to create a huge centrepiece and impress judges Paul and Mary. Meanwhile, Mel heads to Germany to find out how a baker and a few hundred dumplings saved his small town from the ravages of 30 years of war

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood set three batter-related challenges, testing the nine remaining bakers on store cupboard classics. In the signature, the contestants must achieve a uniform bake across the batch, before facing a technical that requires a perfect pastry, a sweet filling and delicate icing. Finally, the fryers are out for the showstopper, which sees the competitors create their version of a Spanish classic. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James meets food critic and broadcaster Grace Dent in Birmingham, taking a trip down the 35-mile canal system in a narrowboat and cooking his version of chicken balti

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The chef visits West Yorkshires biggest rhubarb-growing area and cooks his favourite dessert - rhubarb crumble. He also visits the home of JB Priestley, learns a new recipe for lamb karahi in Bradford, and prepares rabbit pie following his mothers recipe

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The celebrated seafood chef travels to the Peak District to visit his favourite formal vegetable garden at Chatsworth House, before crossing the River Severn to sample the delights of Wales, including cawl, Welsh black cattle, Conway mussels and salt marsh lamb

programme.desc: American chef and cookbook writer Ina Garten shares the secrets of pie-making with her friend Michael, in exchange for some floristry magic

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood set three batter-related challenges, testing the nine remaining bakers on store cupboard classics. In the signature, the contestants must achieve a uniform bake across the batch, before facing a technical that requires a perfect pastry, a sweet filling and delicate icing. Finally, the fryers are out for the showstopper, which sees the competitors create their version of a Spanish classic. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: Ottolenghis Mediterranean Feast
programme.desc: Chef Yotam Ottolenghi travels the southern and eastern Mediterranean to explore its cuisine. He begins his journey in Marrakech, Morocco, tasting its wide variety of street food and soaking up the atmosphere of Jemaa el-Fna square, the citys largest communal dining area. Inspired, he returns to his rooftop kitchen and prepares a barbecued leg of lamb with almonds and orange blossom sauce, and herb-infused couscous with grilled cherry tomatoes, before meeting the Berbers, the countrys indigenous people, in the Atlas Mountains

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Italy
programme.desc: Adams in Florence tasting iconic foods named after this city, including steak Florentine style and street food called Lampredotto alla Fiorentina

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that wont break the budget

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver gives more of the nations favourite dishes a twist, continuing with lasagne with roasted duck, the ultimate bacon sandwich and, from rural Mexico, huevos rancheros - cooked eggs with a spicy tomato salsa, black beans, avocado and a soft tortilla

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Over the past seven editions, Jamie Oliver has given some of the nations favourite dishes a twist, reinventing British classics like shepherds pie, rustling up outdoor treats and transforming old-school desserts such as pavlova and sticky-toffee pudding. For his final menu, he makes fish and chips with an India Pale Ale batter, a treat for vegetarians with his version of the Indonesian salad gado gado, and a speedy crab linguine

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Gareth Ward for a tour of Mid Wales. They begin at a cider-tasting, which James uses to dish up some cider-infused apple fritters. Gareth discovers a farm where the Wagyu cattle fed on local beer. Away from the culinary activities, Gareth is challenged to a rally car ride and James demonstrates his dog training prowess with his trusty hound Cooper

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: In Englands first National Park, the Peak District, James is joined by restaurateur Tessa Bramley, who serves him a beef fillet alongside vegetables from her own garden. He also takes part in an unusual contest - hen racing - where he challenges a local lad and world champion to a race. After discovering some award-winning gin, James meets a local forager and samples some of his elderflower wine. Finally, he uses some of the foraged elderflowers to make a delicious dessert

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King visit a Scottish-Malaysian fusion street food cafe called Kopitiam in Glasgow, where they meet owner Julie, who is on the lookout for fresh and exciting local produce that she can put her own unique and spicy twist on. The duo head off in search of three new suppliers, and get their hands on exciting ingredients including shellfish, venison and some very special salt

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King visit the Cotswolds, and travel to the village of Upper Slaughter to meet chef Charles Smith, who runs two restaurants at Lords of the Manor. He is keen to bring modern cutting-edge cuisine to this historic country house hotel. After sampling dishes from the 10-course tasting menu, the duo learn that Charles sources his ingredients from all over the country. So, theyre determined to find three new local suppliers who could provide equally top-quality ingredients

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King explore Fife, on Scotlands east coast, and visit the Harbour Cafe. Amy is the chef who runs this place alongside husband Jack. The couple insist on using only local, seasonal produce, and fish fresh from the sea just yards from their front door. In April, they literally build the place up, and as the summer season ends, they take it down again. As the building is a temporary structure, theres no mains power, so Amy relies on a charcoal oven

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King are in the Norfolk village of East Barsham, hunting for local produce for creative country pub chef Jake, to help him keep the menu fresh for his 40-seat restaurant. Heading off, they find Norfolk geese at a local farm, a company that makes its own version of versatile vegetarian ingredient Tofu and a family-owned plum orchard. But will Jake be impressed by the Bikers suggestions?

Western, starring Sam Worthington, Heather Graham, Thomas Jane and Colson Baker, also known as Machine Gun Kelly

Pizza delivery rider Chris, 20, is brought in to resus following a motorbike accident. Series following life inside the AandE department of St Georges Hospital, south-west London

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Bedfordshire Police around the clock as they investigate a number of major crimes. A man emerges from a hotel lift covered in blood and holding a fire extinguisher, before approaching the reception desk and shouting that he has killed someone. Cameras follow every twist and turn as detectives try to work out what really happened at the hotel close to Luton Airport, which has suddenly become a chaotic and bloody crime scene

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Freddie, seven, is brought in after falling several metres from a tree in his garden. Hes been in and out of consciousness and doctors are concerned he could have head or spinal injuries. Martin, 66, collapsed at home and spent the night on the floor, and hes now experiencing poor eyesight and dizziness. The stroke team diagnoses a blood clot, but because of the amount of time that has passed since the incident, clot-busting drugs will have little effect. Elsewhere, eight-year-old Jayden has come to St Georges with swollen eyes, the result of severe hay fever

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

Folk musician Tad, 29, has come to AandE after developing a dangerously high heart rate, and doctors must use an electric shock to try to get it back to normal. Meanwhile, 69-year-old Richard is brought in after being found unwell at home by his son, and there are fears he has developed a serious infection

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of the competition from in and around Newcastle, sees Mo act as host with a menu of traditional South African dishes. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at BandB at No 3 in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire. A historical afternoon out at a nearby battlefield earns the hosts some royal points, but over drinks, a breakfast bombshell really scrambles the guests expectations

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The best-value BandB contest continues at the Bull Hotel in Stony Stratford, Buckinghamshire, where Ian and Bev are not impressed by the decor, and breakfast is a topsy-turvy affair

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hoteliers stay at the Chequers Inn in Battle, East Sussex, where Shaun and Kelly Filsell hope the historic surroundings and gourmet breakfast will trump their rivals

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals reunite to discuss their feedback and there are plenty of grievances, not least Mac and Jo wanting to get to the bottom of Ian and Bevs dressing gown comment. programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house hunting in Northern Ireland, with Phil searching for properties in Bangor that would be suitable for Lynn, a woman who has been blind since birth. Meanwhile, Kirstie is in Belfast helping a couple of busy doctors who hope to find a home together before they tie the knot

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help Amy and Brian from Newtownards, Northern Ireland decide whether to move or renovate their five-bedroom chalet bungalow. After 50 years in the same house, Brian has had enough and wants a more spacious home in the countryside with more storage for his hobbies. Kirstie comes up with a plan to make their existing home feel brand new while Phil heads out to find a future-proof property with accessible ground floor accommodation to suit Brians health needs

programme.title: Blanca

Blanca is sent undercover on a course for blind divers to investigate whether a diving centre is the hub for a larger crime ring. Away from the case, she is still confused by her feelings regarding Liguori and Nanni, and bereft without her beloved guide dog. In Italian

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside the AandE department of St Georges in south-west London. Carole, aged 45, is brought in after collapsing at home with chest pains. Tests reveal she has suffered a heart attack, so she undergoes an emergency procedure to unblock an artery. Philip, a 53-year-old psychiatrist, is rushed in following a seizure. Doctors suspect he might have suffered a stroke, but when it is revealed he was diagnosed with lung cancer several months earlier, registrar Chris believes it could be related. Finally, doctors treat 25-year-old Lucy, who is suffering severe headaches brought on by the build-up of excess spinal fluid in her head

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Oxfordshire, a motocross collision leaves 12-year-old-Lewis with a painful broken thighbone, and paraglider Lucasz is treated for multiple fractures after a crash on the Cumbrian coast. programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the Garden House in Blagdon, Somerset, where host and chef Ryan Blackman is hoping his breakfast will wow his guests. But when morning comes around, Susanne and Anwen find their brekkie hard to stomach

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guest house owners head to Ivy House in St Austell, Cornwall, home to James Earl. Susanne and Anwen marvel at the delightful views, but the lack of a lock is a key issue for Ryan and Sarah. At breakfast, Tobys PJs are on the menu but its the sausage thats under scrutiny for Susanne and Anwen

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Leigh from Kent and her nephew Sammy enlist Jasmine Harmans help finding a holiday home in Tenerife within their budget of £300,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: House-hunters Tracey and Fran have been best friends since their schooldays, and theyve now decided to club together to buy a holiday home on the east coast of Fuerteventura. Property expert Danni Menzies lines up five options for the pairs budget of £250,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Horse-lovers Mel and James seek a holiday home in Mijas Pueblo in southern Spain. Laura Hamilton shows them the best of what their £180,000 budget can get them with five impressive properties, hoping that at least one will have them chomping at the bit

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman jets off to Spains southern Costa Cálida to help a pair of house-hunters from Stirlingshire find their dream holiday home. With five grown-up children and five grandchildren between them, Joan and Andrew want a property the whole family can enjoy. With a budget of £80,000 to spend, Ben singles out five impressive properties for the pair to consider

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host of the week in Gloucestershire, IT manager Bea, serves up an international menu inspired by her travels. However, with confusion over her Cretan feta starter and a disastrous guessing game based on countries shes visited, will her guests appreciate her geographical-themed night?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the second night in Gloucestershire, wine connoisseur Adam plans an evening full of posh plonk, excellent etiquette and fine dining. When his dessert falls foul of a custard catastrophe, he decides to pull out a less-than-riveting party trick

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cycling enthusiast Steve hosts the third dinner party of the week in Gloucestershire, hoping to impress his guests with a menu inspired by his travels

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth night in Gloucestershire, shark-loving mum-of-four Lisa plans to give her guests a night of pure entertainment, aiming for lots of light-hearted fun after the previous nights of haute cuisine and wine chat. With a fishcake starter and ribs for the main, Lisas hoping that her back-to-basics food will bag her the grand. And an interpretive dance challenge catches everyone off-guard

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in Gloucestershire, hairdresser Lorna hopes an American 50s diner-style menu will be a success. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are in Ramsgate, Kent for the first visit of the week, where partners Tess and Pete hope their seaside home from home, Rooms@119, will prove a relaxing retreat. Things dont get off to the best start though, when Hillary and Mark discover some unfinished business in their room. In the morning, Pete turns his hand to cooking for six for the first time ever, but finds out the hard way that any waiting around results in lost points come feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother and daughter Laurain and Kerry are second to host at Stable Oak Cottages in Maidstone, Kent, where they are confident their self-catering accommodation will be a hit

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Hosts and dairy farmers Hillary and Mark are hoping to show their guests some high-end hospitality at Hedgerow Luxury Glamping in Clitheroe, Lancashire. But Natasha and Tanya are put off by the discovery of a rather creepy visitor

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Some guests are underwhelmed by the decor, while Kerry and Laurain find themselves complaining over staining in their room. Over dinner, Natashas revelation about how she became a landlady leaves some of the guests questioning her credentials

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment days sees Tess and Pete deal with the fallout from their first-ever six-person breakfast, while Laurain and Kerry are keen to get the bottom of what they believe are filthy comments about their cleanliness. Mattress moans are also on the agenda, before the payments - and winner - are revealed

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Staff at St Georges Hospital tackle one of their most dramatic emergencies when 60-year-old rail worker Alan is airlifted to the helipad after being hit by a high-speed train. A CT scan reveals he has suffered multiple fractures and loss of blood flow to his right arm. Without circulation he will lose the limb, so the medical team tries everything to save it, including complicated surgery. Meanwhile, 95-year-old Betty is brought in after experiencing breathing difficulties at home, and retired engineer James, 63, has a nasty cut to his head and weakness in his arms following a tumble down the stairs

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eleven-month-old Isabel is rushed to St Georges after suffering a seizure and losing consciousness, while 22-year-old Felix is brought to AandE with a self-inflicted stab wound to his stomach. Retired engineer Bill, 68, fell 15ft from a ladder while cutting a leylandii hedge. He arrives by air ambulance with breathing difficulties and suspected multiple fractures

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tree surgeon David, 27, is airlifted to St Georges after falling 40ft to the ground, hitting several branches on his way down and landing head-first onto concrete. Having been knocked unconscious for 10 minutes, the medical team must urgently assess him for internal injuries. Anne, 74, arrives with a sharp pain in her chest, 51-year-old taxi driver Mark receives treatment for a cut on his finger caused by broken glass, and 92-year-old Betty is brought in by ambulance after her carers found her with slurred speech and a shaking hand

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Cameras capture the work of some of Britains busiest air ambulance teams as they race to save lives. The helicopter medics cut short an appearance at a charity event in Suffolk to treat a dirtbiker whos crashed at speed. Sammy has a cardiac arrest while working at a windfarm, and Stephen breaks his thigh while off-road motorbiking in the Pennines

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Staff at St Georges Hospital tackle one of their most dramatic emergencies when 60-year-old rail worker Alan is airlifted to the helipad after being hit by a high-speed train. A CT scan reveals he has suffered multiple fractures and loss of blood flow to his right arm. Without circulation he will lose the limb, so the medical team tries everything to save it, including complicated surgery. Meanwhile, 95-year-old Betty is brought in after experiencing breathing difficulties at home, and retired engineer James, 63, has a nasty cut to his head and weakness in his arms following a tumble down the stairs

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eleven-month-old Isabel is rushed to St Georges after suffering a seizure and losing consciousness, while 22-year-old Felix is brought to AandE with a self-inflicted stab wound to his stomach. Retired engineer Bill, 68, fell 15ft from a ladder while cutting a leylandii hedge. He arrives by air ambulance with breathing difficulties and suspected multiple fractures

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside the AandE department of St Georges in south-west London. Carole, aged 45, is brought in after collapsing at home with chest pains. Tests reveal she has suffered a heart attack, so she undergoes an emergency procedure to unblock an artery. Philip, a 53-year-old psychiatrist, is rushed in following a seizure. Doctors suspect he might have suffered a stroke, but when it is revealed he was diagnosed with lung cancer several months earlier, registrar Chris believes it could be related. Finally, doctors treat 25-year-old Lucy, who is suffering severe headaches brought on by the build-up of excess spinal fluid in her head

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Freddie, seven, is brought in after falling several metres from a tree in his garden. Hes been in and out of consciousness and doctors are concerned he could have head or spinal injuries. Martin, 66, collapsed at home and spent the night on the floor, and hes now experiencing poor eyesight and dizziness. The stroke team diagnoses a blood clot, but because of the amount of time that has passed since the incident, clot-busting drugs will have little effect. Elsewhere, eight-year-old Jayden has come to St Georges with swollen eyes, the result of severe hay fever

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Retired builder Roger has fallen 13ft from his daughters roof and the trauma team is concerned he may have badly injured his head, back and neck. Folk musician Tad, 29, has come to AandE after developing a dangerously high heart rate, and doctors must use an electric shock to try to get it back to normal. Meanwhile, 69-year-old Richard is brought in after being found unwell at home by his son, and there are fears he has developed a serious infection

programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw enter the weird and wonderful world of the Bond Bug - a wedge-shaped three-wheel car from the early 1970s. The car belongs to 69-year-old Ian, whose dreams of joining the Bond Bug owners club and taking part in rallies and car shows were cruelly thwarted when he developed Parkinsons disease. programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: A look at one of Britains worst air disasters - the crash of British European Airways 548, which saw 118 people lose their lives. The plane plummeted shortly after taking off from Heathrow on June 18, 1972 and narrowly missed a main road before crashing into a field. Investigators were forced to rely on witness testimony to determine why the plane nosedived as there was no cockpit voice recorder on board, but both the investigation process and its results were deemed controversial

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: The tragic stories behind ships and aircraft sunk during the Second World War, including bombers, kamikaze planes and a U-boat with a poisonous legacy

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler Takes on the West
programme.desc: Part one of two. Nazi offensives on Western nations during the Second World War. Nine months into the war, all-out attacks are made on Belgium, the Netherlands, France and the UK

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler Takes on the West
programme.desc: Part two of two. France under German occupation. The government signs an armistice as half the country is taken over and plunged into chaos, while people try to escape

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: The story of British Airways Flight 38s crash-landing at Heathrow in January 2008. Minutes before touchdown, the plane suffered a loss of power and plunged into a rapid descent, missing the tops of houses by only 200ft, as it struggled to reach the airport

programme.title: Seconds from Disaster
programme.desc: In 1982, a delayed flight from the US capital crashed into a bridge on the River Potomac. All but five of the passengers perished under the water. How did this happen?

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend revive a rotting Land Rover Discovery Series 1 which is a beloved family heirloom. While Fuzz rhapsodises about the engine, Tim enlists legendary designer Mike Sampson to share how his car helped to save Land Rover

programme.title: Flintoff
programme.desc: In December 2022, Andrew Freddie Flintoff sustained severe injuries while filming at the Dunsfold Aerodrome in Surrey for an episode of Top Gear. He disappeared from public view to begin his rehabilitation and later said that he felt lucky to be alive. Award-winning filmmaker John Dower follows Flintoff over the course of 12 months to document his recovery and the impact on his life away from the spotlight. The feature-length film invites the former international cricketer and broadcast presenter to reflect on his sporting career, which including two Ashes series wins with England

programme.title: 10 Mistakes That Sank the Titanic
programme.desc: Documentary examining the chain of events that led to the maritime disaster in April 1912, when the ship struck an iceberg in the north Atlantic and went down with around 1,500 passengers and crew. From the procedure for fixing rivets into the ships bows, the delays in its construction that pushed the maiden voyage into perilous iceberg season, and the astonishing fact that the lookouts on watch that fateful night had no access to binoculars, this film reveals the 10 key mistakes that conspired to sink the supposedly unsinkable Titanic

programme.title: Who Killed Ivan the Terrible?
programme.desc: Criminologist David Wilson investigates the mysterious death of Russias first dictator, beginning by analysing rumours that the man who used terror to rule his huge empire may have been strangled by enemies in his court. The trail takes Wilson across Russia and back to London, where he explores a story of intrigue surrounding Englands Queen Elizabeth I, uncovering clues along the way which lead to a final twist in the tale

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton sets out to visit some of the many islands that lay off the coastline. Heading to Foula and Fair Isle - the most remote island communities in Britain - he makes a nerve-racking visit to Da Snekk o da Smallie - a pothole in the cliffs of Foula that leads through to the Atlantic shore on the island, and learns about the beautiful knitting patterns that have made Fair Isle famous around the word

programme.title: World of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Neil Oliver explores the origins of Britain and its people, a story forged over thousands of years. In south Wales, he joins a team of archaeologists to examine 8,000-year-old footprints revealed beneath tidal mud banks, and abseils into a cave dating back 33,000 years. The historian also reveals how, as the last ice age receded some 11,000 years ago, Britain became an island, a fate that was sealed following a cataclysmic tsunami around 6,000 BC

programme.title: World of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Neil Oliver examines what impact the arrival of farming had on ancient social structures. He dives off the Isle of Wight where archaeologists have found an 8,000-year-old hunter settlement and learns what happened when hunter-gatherers met farmers for the first time. The historian reveals that when cultivation eventually came to Britain around 4,000 BC, it brought about the Neolithic era and a deep set of changes in peoples way of life, from ground-breaking inventions like pottery, to new belief systems

programme.title: World of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Neil Oliver delves into the mysteries of the Stone Age and the meaning of the sacred monuments that were built throughout Britain and Ireland. He begins by visiting a 6,000-year-old axe factory in the Lake District to explore how the use of stone shaped a belief system that included the cosmos for the first time. The historian also joins people arriving in Stonehenge to celebrate the mid-summer sunrise, and learns about the religious and sociological significance of the monument

programme.title: World of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Neil Oliver examines the consequences of the application of metal to everyday life. He travels to the south-west of Ireland in search of the first copper to be mined beyond mainland Europe. He also handles the possessions of the Amesbury Archer, which contained earliest copper and gold ever found in Britain, putting the islands with their rich natural resources at the technological forefront of the Bronze Age

programme.title: The Anti-Soviet Fighters
programme.desc: The resistance of a handful of Lithuanian, Latvian and Estonian partisans against the Soviet Unions stranglehold on their territory at the end of the Second World War

programme.title: Iron Curtain: Living Under Soviet Occupation
programme.desc: In 1945, as his Red Army advanced towards Berlin to liberate Europe from Nazism, Stalin pursued another goal - to join the countries of Eastern Europe to his empire. In just a few years he succeeded in imposing the Soviet totalitarian model with an iron fist across Poland, Hungary, East Germany and Czechoslovakia. Citizens of those nations tell their stories of how their countries were occupied and transformed into communist states

programme.title: Iron Curtain: Living Under Soviet Occupation
programme.desc: In December 1949, Stalins empire celebrated its leaders 70th birthday. Soviet domination of Eastern European countries was total and will remain so until the dictators death in 1953

programme.title: Iron Curtain: Living Under Soviet Occupation
programme.desc: After Stalins death, the countries of the Eastern Bloc hoped for the end of communist dictatorship. Revolts spread, but Moscows grip was still strong and insurrections were brutally suppressed. The construction of the Berlin Wall in 1961 - physically dividing the German capital - stifled any hope of change

programme.title: Great Forts of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Exploring the epic battles, intricate designs and world-altering legacies of the great fortresses in the Mediterranean. Featuring Crusader forts in Rhodes, Malta and the Levant, Ottoman forts in Greece, Venetian forts in Crete, Moorish forts in Spain, Portugal, Morocco and Algeria, and Portuguese and Spanish forts on the North African coast

programme.desc: Irita Marriott finds old Italian paintings and the rarest porcelain shes ever sold, and an aspiring antiques dealer finds out if he has an eye for a bargain.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: Brent and his son Cayden set off on an adventure to find highly valuable, crystalline gold. Plus, Sheryl and Simon hit it big on new ground.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: A painting depicting the Lebanese city of Beirut arrives at the barn. It was painted by Nonny Jackson-Twists grandfather just after the Second World War. He would very much like to hang the painting in his home, but its faded, the canvas cracked and in some sections the paint is flaking away. However, fine art conservator Lucia Scalisi is only too happy to take on this monumental task. Also being restored are pair of silver Shabbat candlesticks and a dilapidated car jack. Presented by Jay Blades

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Microbiology reveals why a Medieval child was buried with a stone in its mouth. Plus, science uncovers the truth behind a terrifying Roman weapon

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files

programme.title: How Its Made

programme.title: How Its Made

programme.title: How Its Made
programme.desc: Robotic arms, tattoos, napkins and concrete pipes: more items are put under the microscope to find out how they were made

programme.title: Forensic Detectives

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.title: Forensic Detectives

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: The presenter recalls the murder of a promising young lawyer at Scott Rothsteins Fort Lauderdale law firm. Investigation into Rothstein revealed a complex Ponzi fraud scheme, duping unwary victims

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: When a doctor returned home on Valentines Day to surprise his wife, he instead found her dead. Aphrodite Jones revisits the details, finding nothing in this case is as it seems

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: The story of 34-year-old Montana mother-of-four Susan Casey, who went missing after a date in April 2008, with her body found in the Yellowstone River a month later. As journalist Aphrodite Jones reports, detectives readily identified three male suspects

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: The disappearance of a woman known to have previously attracted the attentions of a stalker. Police set about proving she had been murdered - without a body, and as Aphrodite Jones reveals, the investigation shed light on a case filled with twists and turns

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: The author explores a case in which a parishioner was shot to death while working in the office of her church in Bucks County, Pennsylvania

programme.desc: Drew seeks out a combination of knowledge and experience when he visits four family businesses. He discovers an exciting array of items to sell on

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew indulges his Georgian obsession in Lincoln, where he falls for a Regency wine cooler. And a bungalow near Stockport hides a vast collection

programme.title: Salvage Hunters

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: As their quest for bargains continues, Serhat Ahmet is on the hunt once more for ceramics, while Catherine Southon has her eye on a more eclectic mix of items. Serhat makes some new four-legged friends and finds out about a refugee fleeing his war-torn country who became a local legend in his adopted home town thanks to his crazy stunts and feats of strength. Catherine also gets a taste of a high-speed motorsport and goes for a ride from which she might never recover

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Serhat Ahmet and Catherine Southon start the final lap of their antiques race on the bumpy backroads of Lincolnshire, heading to their final destination of Silverstone - the home of the British Grand Prix - in Northamptonshire. On their travels, Catherine discovers the history of the most iconic of classical instruments at a school that teaches students how to make them. Meanwhile, Serhat hears the story of how a group of enterprising 18th-century miners helped turn a peak in Derbyshire into one of the countrys earliest tourist attractions

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Silversmith Brenton West repairs a boxing trophy won by an accomplished sportsman and much-loved grandfather. Larry Gaines fought professionally from 1923 and refused to let prejudice hamper his career. He was the first black boxer to fight in the Royal Albert Hall and his family is immensely proud of him. Also being restored are a pair of old football boots and a vintage globe. Presented by Jay Blades

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus uncovers a rare coin collection and some vintage hair cutting gear. An old sea chest proves to be a treasure trove at auction

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell revisit more of the programmes most memorable searches, catching up with three people whose lives have been transformed in ways they never imagined. Those featured are Cathie Cutler Evans, who was desperate to find the birth mother who had given her up for adoption nearly 50 years earlier, as well as John Ayton, who longed to find his father Kenneth after being adopted as a baby, and Maureen Charlton, who came to the programme looking for her brother Michael

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell revisit three more memorable stories, including divorced couple Marion Williams and James McDonnell, who were reunited with the son they gave up for adoption as teenagers. The programme also joins Ray Jones in Liverpool as he spends time with two of his new brothers and sisters and tries to come to terms with everything hes uncovered about his family, as well as following Laura Aker on a trip to Nigeria to see her father for a second time, and to meet her huge new extended Nigerian family

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.sub-title: A Little Lady Makes Big Money

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Ishy Khan and Natasha Raskin Sharp - Day 5
programme.desc: Ishy Khan and Natasha Raskin Sharp kick-off their final leg in Heanor, Derbyshire. Tasha scoops up a 17th-century map of Nottinghamshire, a Victorian reception bell and a glowing pair of Aesthetic Movement sunflower firedogs. programme.desc: England v Ireland (Kick-off 2.25pm). All the action from both teams opening match of the championship, held at Allianz Stadium Twickenham. England have won this title in each of the last seven years and were also crowned world champions in 2025. They claimed a 49-5 victory when these sides met in Cork in last years competition, though they only led 7-5 at half time.
