programme.desc: The 1976 Formula 1 Championship season is dominated by a fierce rivalry between two contrasting drivers, as daredevil English driver James Hunt and methodical Austrian defending champion Niki Lauda put their lives on the line to outdo each other on the track. Fact-based drama, starring Chris Hemsworth and Daniel Bruhl, with Olivia Wilde and Alexandra Maria Lara

programme.title: Nightsleeper
programme.desc: With the passengers turning on each other in the aftermath of tragedy, Abby desperately attempts to rally the traumatised Joe and persuade him to take back control. But when Huds shock attempt to stop the train his way puts everyone onboard in more peril, Joe is suddenly left fighting fires on multiple fronts. Real-time thriller, starring Alexandra Roach and Joe Cole

programme.title: Hitlers Gold
programme.desc: The documentary exploring the covert financial web spun by the Nazis continues by exploring how their finances were affected by preparing for and fighting war in Europe

programme.title: Peacock
programme.desc: New authentic Andy is set to go on a second date with Georgia, but old Andy resurfaces and cannot resist a test of strength with Jay, which threatens to ruin everything

programme.title: In Her Car
programme.sub-title: A Fairy Tale About a Viburnum Flute
programme.desc: Lydia recovers from the attack and reconnects with her daughter Dasha. Drama, starring Anastasiya Karpenko. In Ukrainian

programme.title: EuroNews
programme.desc: European and international headlines live via satellite

programme.title: Kate Winslet: A Quest for Authenticity
programme.desc: Exploring actress Kate Winslets career choices, focusing on the way she purposely chooses complex roles that defy the Hollywood cliche of the young romantic heroine and analysing her commitment to playing authentic women with realistic bodies and complex psyches

programme.title: Blue Road: The Edna OBrien Story (2024)
programme.desc: The Irish novelist reflects on her life, novels, love affairs and stardom through journals read by actress Jessie Buckley, with contributions by Gabriel Byrne and Walter Mosley

programme.title: National Treasures: The Art of Collecting
programme.desc: The programme heads to Venice to explore Francesco Carraros remarkable collection of Venetian glass, which includes works by the much-lauded Carlo Scarpa

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: The huge personal guitar collection of Pink Floyds David Gilmour comes to Christies - including the black Fender Stratocaster that featured on many of the bands records

programme.title: Watercolour Challenge
programme.desc: Hannah Gordon hosts the art competition in which amateur watercolour painters compete against the clock and each other to capture a scene in just four hours

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A womans gift for her lovers bride-to-be could not be more suitable - or so she thinks

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.sub-title: The Three Dreams of Mr Findlater
programme.desc: Ernest Findlater is constantly nagged at by his wife so he fantasizes about Lalage, an exotic lover from the South Seas. With John Williams and Barbara Baxley

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A newsman plays a joke on a homeless man by showing him a fake article that says the world is going to end that night, but the prank has deadly results. With Russell Collins and Harold J Stone

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the career of English director Stephen Frears, whose films include My Beautiful Laundrette, Dangerous Liaisons, The Grifters, High Fidelity, The Queen and Philomena

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A captain has to deal with a man on board his airliner who seizes a stewardess, holds her hostage and demands a million dollars in ransom money and a parachute for himself. Starring Denis Quilley, Suzanne Danielle and Simon Cadell

programme.title: The Misfits (1961)
programme.desc: While filing for a divorce, beautiful ex-stripper Roslyn Taber ends up meeting aging cowboy-turned-gambler Gay Langland and former World War II aviator Guido Racanelli. The two men instantly become infatuated with Roslyn and, on a whim, the three decide to move into Guidos half-finished desert home together. When grizzled ex-rodeo rider Perce Howland arrives, the unlikely foursome strike up a business capturing wild horses. Romantic Western starring Marilyn Monroe, Clark Gable, Montgomery Clift, Eli Wallach and Thelma Ritter

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of John Carpenter, known for his cult classics such as Dark Star, The Thing and Halloween

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the American actor, who starred in Easy Rider, Apocalypse Now and Speed

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A woman eavesdrops on a private conversation while at lunch, which has disastrous repercussions on her marriage

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A retired thief tries to break into a new safe as a publicity stunt, but the money inside proves too much of a temptation for the ex-convict. Starring John Mills and June Ritchie

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A murderer has been strangling people in the London fog and a reporter manages to continually make it to the crime scene before a police sergeant. Rhys Williams and Theodore Bikel star

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents

programme.desc: The Elbow frontman introduces archive TV appearance by Britpop era bands, including Oasis, Pulp, Suede, Blur Sleeper, Dodgy, Echobelly, Longpigs and Marion

programme.title: Hendrix: Band of Gypsys
programme.desc: A look back at the historic Jimi Hendrix concert performance at the Fillmore East in New York City on January 1, 1970

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix at Woodstock
programme.desc: Highlights from the guitarists set at the 1969 festival, including Purple Haze, Voodoo Chile and Hear My Train a Comin and an extraordinary rendition of The Star-Spangled Banner

programme.title: Phil Lynott: Songs for While Im Away
programme.desc: The life and music of the Thin Lizzy frontman, telling the story of how a young working-class black boy from 1950s Dublin became one of Irelands greatest rock stars. Told extensively through the words of Lynott himself and focusing on some of his songs, the film gets to the heart of Philip as a father, husband, friend, son and rock legend, who died at the age of 36 in January 1986

programme.desc: The art collection of the singer-songwriter goes under the hammer at Christies in a special auction featuring works by Tracey Emin, Damien Hirst and Bridget Riley

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: Bonhams auctions a collection of letters written by Jackie Kennedy that she sent to British diplomat David Ormsby-Gore shortly after being widowed

programme.title: Pavarotti in Central Park
programme.desc: The great tenor performs favourite arias, including O Sole Mio and Nessun Dorma, with the New York Philharmonic and the Boys Choir of Harlem

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A devious woman meets her match when she tries to take advantage of a struggling artist

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A wealthy mans wife plans to murder him - but her astute husband proves more ruthless than she bargained for. Starring Telly Savalas and Rita Gam

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An ordinary married couple inherit a fortune that has a dramatic effect on their lives. Starring Frank Finlay and Heather Sears

programme.desc: The wife of an inveterate gambler tells him to either give up poker or else she will leave him. Starring Gig Young, Martha Hyer and Robert Redford

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: An assailant is brutally attacking women in a small college town and a host of weird staff members are suspects. Starring Jeffrey Hunter and Vera Miles

programme.sub-title: Alistair MacLean to John le Carre
programme.desc: A look at how Cold War storytelling came alive in books by Fredrick Forsyth, Alistair MacLean and John le Carre, with clips from films including The Third Man

programme.desc: Profile of the band, including an interview with members Graham Nash, Allan Clarke, Tony Hicks and Bobby Elliott and archive TV performances by the group from 1963 to 1975

programme.desc: The story of PiL, the groundbreaking band formed by John Lydon after the collapse of Sex Pistols in 1978

Drama, Paul Giamatti and Damian Lewis star

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: A spontaneous trip to a Metallica gig causes Axe to question his freedom. Meanwhile, Chuck must assesses his own fathers business dealings. Drama, starring Damian Lewis

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: First episode of the drama set in a lawless US town in the aftermath of Little Big Horn, where everyones a gold digger, from hopeful prospectors to the saloon hookers. Former Montana marshal Seth Bullock relocates to a gold-mining camp known as Deadwood in Dakota Territory, looking to start a hardware business with his partner, Sol Star. Starring Ian McShane as ruthless saloon owner Al Swearengen, Timothy Olyphant as store manager Seth Bullock and Molly Parker as Alma Garrett

programme.desc: Calamity Jane and Doc Cochran care for the little girl who survived the massacre, as suspicions arise that the Indians may not have been to blame. programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Al is furious when Cy Tolliver appears in Deadwood planning to open a rival brothel, and vows to find out who helped the crafty businessman sneak into town. programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Alma enlists Hickoks help in an attempt to get to the bottom of her husbands death. However, there is also a plot being made against Bills own life

programme.desc: Floyds ego takes a hit after a failed attempt to reconnect with Carol, leading Clark to help his friend using the DTF app. Black comedy, starring David Harbour

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Shane confirms Roses suspicions and admits he is gay, but they agree to remain friends. At the 2017 all-star game, Ilya and Shane reconnect and they play on the same team for the first time

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Kip and his friends watch on TV as Scott discusses his public coming out while accepting the MVP award. Shane drives to his cottage with Ilya, who shares the trauma of his mothers death by suicide

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Lewis and Crosetti expose a woman who has been marrying and then killing men to get her hands on their money. Crime drama, starring Daniel Baldwin

programme.title: House of the Dragon

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Bayliss and Pembleton check out the death of a police dog. Howard tracks down a drug dealer who is wanted for murder and Bolander meets Carols son. Gritty police drama, guest starring Edie Falco, with Daniel Baldwin and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Lewis and Crosetti investigate the murder of a Chinese political refugee, and suspect he may have been killed because of his involvement in the Tiananmen Square protests. Police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: Sabi and the family do their best to get used to the new rhythm, while Paul pretends to be Bessy in order to text with Penny

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Pat Seddon considers selling up and visits a clairvoyant, while celebrity chef Mitch Tonks makes an appearance at Brixhams Crab Festival

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He begins in London at St Pauls Cathedral, where he visits a place tourists never go, before exploring a hidden park and a little-known church. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming tours the less-celebrated sights of Brighton, beginning by visiting the Toy and Model Museum to look at its collection of model trains. He then discovers a boutique that sells a variety of unusual items, before taking a glimpse behind the scenes at the Royal Pavilion

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: A lawyer and a hedge fund king enter a game of high stakes as each uses their power and influence to outmanoeuvre each other in the world of New York City high finance. Drama, starring Paul Giamatti and Damian Lewis

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Chucks probe is temporarily derailed by a new investigation into Steven Birch, while Axe makes an aggressive business move under the guise of a charitable contribution in order to settle an old score. Drama, Paul Giamatti and Damian Lewis star

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Chuck discovers that the rival Eastern District has made inroads in the Axe case, while Axe makes an activist play for a family owned bakery corporation. Elsewhere, Wendy is thrown into a moral dilemma during a confidential session as Axes wife Lara tries to protect her husbands reputation from a potentially damaging tell all book. Drama, Paul Giamatti and Damian Lewis star

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: A spontaneous trip to a Metallica gig causes Axe to question his freedom. Meanwhile, Chuck must assesses his own fathers business dealings. Drama, starring Damian Lewis

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: First episode of the drama set in a lawless US town in the aftermath of Little Big Horn, where everyones a gold digger, from hopeful prospectors to the saloon hookers. Former Montana marshal Seth Bullock relocates to a gold-mining camp known as Deadwood in Dakota Territory, looking to start a hardware business with his partner, Sol Star. Starring Ian McShane as ruthless saloon owner Al Swearengen, Timothy Olyphant as store manager Seth Bullock and Molly Parker as Alma Garrett

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Calamity Jane and Doc Cochran care for the little girl who survived the massacre, as suspicions arise that the Indians may not have been to blame. Hickok asks Bullock for protection in a high-stakes poker game, and Tom Mason is determined to exact his revenge. Starring Ian McShane, Timothy Olyphant and Nick Offerman

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Al is furious when Cy Tolliver appears in Deadwood planning to open a rival brothel, and vows to find out who helped the crafty businessman sneak into town. Meanwhile, Brom Garrett confronts the saloon owner over his dud gold claim. Starring Ian McShane, Timothy Olyphant and Molly Parker

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Alma enlists Hickoks help in an attempt to get to the bottom of her husbands death. However, there is also a plot being made against Bills own life

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: King Viserys Targaryen hosts a tournament to celebrate the impending birth of his second child, while his daughter Rhaenyra welcomes her Uncle Daemon back to the Red Keep. First episode of the Game of Thrones prequel, starring Paddy Considine and Matt Smith

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra oversteps at the Small Council, while Viserys is urged to secure the succession through a new marriage and Daemon announces his intentions

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Daemon and the Sea Snake battle the Crabfeeder, while the realm celebrates Aegons second nameday and Rhaenyra faces the prospect of marriage. Paddy Considine and Matt Smith star

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra continues her search for a suitable match, while Daemon returns to Kings Landing and stirs more trouble for the king. Rhaenyra learns a valuable lesson

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.sub-title: Lady Tomato and Mr F Tomato-Head
programme.desc: Lindy Littlejohn is shrunk to a height of six inches in a technological mishap and is forced to re-evaluate her relationship with husband Les. leading to battle for power. Romantic sci-fi comedy drama, starring Elizabeth Banks and Matthew Macfadyen

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the town of Ennis, Alaska, the eight men working at the Tsalal Arctic Research Station all disappear. Local police chief Liz Danvers leads the investigation, but state trooper Evangeline Navarro believes it may be linked to an unsolved murder. The return of the crime anthology, starring Jodie Foster and Kali Reis

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Danvers and Prior set out to learn more about Tsalal - and find an unlikely location for the physical evidence - Captain Connelly threatens to hand the case over to Anchorage. Later, Navarro and Danvers separately find a connection between one of the Tsalal men and Annie, prompting the former partners to agree to work the case together

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Newcomer Bayliss takes charge of a harrowing case, only to find a vital piece of evidence has been removed from the scene of the crime. Meanwhile, Bolander and Munch investigate the same death twice. Detective drama, starring Yaphet Kotto, Kyle Secor, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Giardellos attempts to improve the units effectiveness are thwarted by in-fighting, as Pembleton and Bayliss clash and Crosetti proves over-eager to nail the man who shot his partner. Gritty police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Bolander and Munch investigate the murder of a man linked to a cocaine cartel, Bayliss continues his steamy relationship with Emma Zoole, and Felton strives to find his children. Police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin, Richard Belzer and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Aquaman (2018)
programme.desc: The underwater kingdom of Atlantis is ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a huge army at his command, he plans to conquer the oceanic people before taking on the rest of the world. Arthur Curry, Orms half-brother and the human-raised heir to Atlantis, embarks on a globetrotting quest to stop him. But a ruthless mercenary is on his trail, seeking revenge. Superhero adventure, starring Jason Momoa, Nicole Kidman and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probes return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.title: Batman (1989)
programme.desc: The masked avenger stalks the streets of Gotham City, waging a nightly war against the criminal element. However, he may have met his match when the citys crime syndicate is taken over by the crazed Joker, who plans to poison the populace with toxic chemicals. Tim Burtons comic-book adventure, starring Michael Keaton, Jack Nicholson and Kim Basinger

programme.title: Batman Returns (1992)
programme.desc: The masked hero returns to face the Penguin, a grotesque crime boss dwelling in the sewers who conspires with a corrupt businessman to make himself mayor. When the tycoon tries to kill his secretary, she returns as vengeful vigilante Catwoman, who soon forms an intense relationship with the dark knight in both their costumed and real identities. Tim Burtons comic-book adventure sequel, starring Michael Keaton, Danny DeVito and Michelle Pfeiffer

programme.title: Batman Forever (1995)
programme.desc: The masked crimefighter takes on the twin threats of disfigured maniac Two-Face and insane genius the Riddler, who are plotting to control the brains of the entire world. Meanwhile, an acrobat whose family has been murdered by Two-Face steps up to join Batman in his fight against evil. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Val Kilmer, Tommy Lee Jones, Nicole Kidman, Jim Carrey and Chris ODonnell

programme.title: Batman and Robin (1997)
programme.desc: The caped crusader and his sidekick take on the villainous Mr Freeze, who plans to destroy Gotham City with an icy doomsday weapon unless his demands are met. The dynamic duo also have to contend with femme fatale Poison Ivy, who is determined to drive a wedge between them. Comic-book adventure, starring George Clooney, Arnold Schwarzenegger, Uma Thurman and Chris ODonnell

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Flavia (2025)
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Family adventure, starring Molly Belle Wright, Martin Freeman, Jonathan Pryce and Toby Jones

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
programme.desc: An unassuming hobbit is plunged into a battle against the forces of darkness when his uncle bequeaths him a magical ring of immense power. He joins a fellowship of heroes to embark on a perilous quest to destroy the ring before it falls into the hands of its creator - a dark lord who needs it to regain his power and conquer the world. The first part of Peter Jacksons epic fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Viggo Mortensen, Sean Astin, Christopher Lee, Liv Tyler and Orlando Bloom

programme.desc: Mildred, an 11-year-old girl, finds her world turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, takes her on a wild adventure. Family comedy, starring Elijah Wood and Nell Fisher

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: Peter Pan (2003)
programme.desc: The adventures of the boy who never grows old, as he whisks Wendy Darling and her brothers away to the magical world of Neverland - where they come face to face with fearsome Captain Hook. Adaptation of JM Barries fantasy novel, starring Jeremy Sumpter, Rachel Hurd-Wood, Jason Isaacs and Lynn Redgrave

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

Meanwhile, their allies prepare to make a desperate last stand against the vast armies of the corrupted wizard Saruman, who has declared war on a neighbouring kingdom. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Sean Astin, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen, Billy Boyd, Dominic Monaghan, Andy Serkis and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)

programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin, Alden Ehrenreich and an Oscar-winning Amy Madigan

Sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. programme.title: The Great Elephant Tale
programme.desc: Documentary revealing how the African elephant has conquered the continent, following three vastly different herds - a matriarch leading her family across the merciless Namibian desert, a family protecting its young calf on the unforgiving planes of the Okavango Delta and a bull elephant searching for a mate along the immense Zambezi River

programme.title: How the Wild Things Sleep
programme.desc: The secrets of the most extreme sleepers of the animal kingdom, looking at how they deal with sleep deprivation and trying to discover whether animals dream

programme.title: Bugs That Ruled the World
programme.desc: A global investigation into insect declines, exploring their diversity and their critical roles on the planet. Scientists reveal the beauty of bugs, from pollinators to insect assassins to the tiny clean-up crews that purify the planet

programme.title: Bugs That Ruled the World
programme.desc: Learning how bees, butterflies, moths and other pollinators keep the fields fruitful and exploring what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished

programme.title: Wolves and Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: Felines and canids clash across the world. This edition dives into direct battles and strategies to steal food. Intelligence and strength decide who reigns in each territory

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: A look at Australias Wild West - The Kimberley - the animals who live there and tracking the quests of those working to protect them. Cameras follow wallabies, koolamana lizards and crocodile hatchlings as they face the wild rivers dangers and discover the true power of this waterway

programme.title: Monkey Island
programme.desc: The power struggles in an ancient citadel, once home to Sri Lankas kings but now ruled over by a new dynasty - monkeys. The jungles are a monkeys paradise but not all are equal. Anna sits at the bottom of the social ladder - and with a newborn baby, life is getting tougher

programme.title: Monkey Island
programme.desc: Having come of age, male macaque Ravi leaves home for a journey of a lifetime. It will involve the big city, grave dangers and finding a new troop

programme.title: Monkey Island
programme.desc: Sri Lankas ancient temples are home to tufted grey langurs, toque macaques and purple-faced leaf monkeys - but there is trouble in the monkey paradise

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Following his visit to the Great Barrier Reef in 1957, naturalist and broadcaster David Attenborough returns and uses the latest filming techniques to unlock the secrets of the natural wonder. In the first edition, he descends beneath the waves at night and uses cutting-edge technology to generate computer scans of the sea floor. He also learns about a complex community of animals, as well as the annual coral spawning, which is responsible for the great diversity in the reef

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Using the latest technology, the naturalist explores the shark-infested waters of Osprey Reef in the Triton submersible, before returning to the nesting grounds of the Green Sea Turtle, 60 years after his first visit to Raine Island. He also marvels at manta ray cleaning stations on Lady Elliot Island, and tracks dwarf minke whales to discover their surprising reasons for returning, and why the reef is vital for their survival

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The naturalist examines what the next few decades may hold for this remarkable ecosystem, and looks at the work of scientists who are trying to preserve the area and the species that inhabit it, assisted by research vessel the Alucia. He also embarks on an ambitious attempt to dive further into the reef than ever before to witness the resilient coral that live down in the depths and see if they hold answers that may help to overcome challenges that lie ahead, as the impact of humans on the reef continues to take its toll

programme.title: A Cheetahs Pride
programme.desc: Wildlife documentary. This series follows a pair of warring cheetahs as they fight for possession of their cubs

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: In Zimbabwe, an African wild dog pack find themselves outnumbered by lions and hyenas, and the pups must learn quickly if the pack is to survive

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs Pride
programme.desc: Following the wild dog packs of Africa. Roaming with the pups of the Manzi and Kakumbi packs in South Luangwa, Zambia

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs Pride
programme.desc: Julz runs into a lion-hyena showdown and Henry goes on a house call to the Kakumbi den, where a pup has gone AWOL

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: A look at Australias Wild West - The Kimberley - the animals who live there and tracking the quests of those working to protect them

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: In Zimbabwe, an African wild dog pack find themselves outnumbered by lions and hyenas, and the pups must learn quickly if the pack is to survive

programme.title: The Island of Giants
programme.desc: Exploring how whale sharks drive the culture of Santa Maria, the only European hotspot for these giants and why warming seas may be drawing them in

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: The wildlife of New Zealands South Island, a brutal place hemmed in by giant mountains, wild winds and the rough Pacific Ocean. Rare penguins are locked in a daily game of cat and mouse with giant sea lions, which must also battle the elements to survive

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: Winters impact on the deep fjords and tidal lagoons of southwestern New Zealand. As bottlenose dolphins escape the freezing fjords, longfin eels are called back to sea

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training (1986)
programme.desc: Facing closure from cutbacks in public spending and competition from a more successful academy, the police training school calls on its bungling graduates to act as instructors and make good officers out of a bunch of new recruits even more incompetent than they are. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, Michael Winslow and Art Metrano

programme.title: Lethal Weapon (1987)
programme.desc: An unstable Vietnam veteran cop teams up with a by-the-book Los Angeles police detective to investigate the apparent suicide of the daughter of a wealthy businessman, leading them to a violent and bloody confrontation with a ruthless drug cartel under the control of a retired US general. Action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Gary Busey, Mitchell Ryan and Tom Atkins

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2 (1989)
programme.desc: Headstrong cop Martin Riggs and his cautious partner Roger Murtaugh stumble across a plot by a South African diplomat to launder drugs money by shipping gold coins into the US via his embassy. Protected by diplomatic immunity, the crook looks certain to evade the law - while his chief henchman has a connection to Riggs traumatic past. Action thriller sequel, with Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci, Joss Ackland, Derrick OConnor and Patsy Kensit

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3 (1992)
programme.desc: As Murtagh counts down his last few days on the force before retirement, he and Riggs go on the trail of a former LAPD officer who is using his insider knowledge to steal confiscated weaponry and ammunition, then selling it on to criminal gang bosses. The duo are assigned to work with internal affairs investigator Lorna Cole, while they also get help from old friend - and reformed small-time crook - Leo Getz. Action thriller sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci and Rene Russo

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4 (1998)
programme.desc: Mismatched LAPD detectives Riggs and Murtaugh stumble across a ship transporting Chinese immigrants into the US. As they try to get to the bottom of the organisation behind the smuggling, they find themselves up against a master criminal who is an expert in martial arts and heads a triad responsible for people-trafficking and forgery. Action adventure sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Rene Russo, Joe Pesci, Jet Li and Chris Rock

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (2018)
programme.desc: Robert McCall divides his time between cab driving and looking after a young man who is mixing with a bad crowd. When a CIA friend is murdered, the former black ops agent sets out to avenge her death, and winds up fighting for survival in his hurricane-battered home town. Action thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Pedro Pascal and Ashton Sanders

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: Scientists are given a sneak preview of a safari park inhabited by genetically engineered dinosaurs created by an eccentric tycoon. However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielbergs action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park (1997)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Ian Malcolm reluctantly joins a research team on the island where his employer first designed genetically engineered dinosaurs. Meanwhile, a big-game hunter takes the chance to bag the biggest prize of all - a Tyrannosaurus rex. Steven Spielbergs dinosaur adventure sequel, starring Jeff Goldblum, Julianne Moore, Pete Postlethwaite and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Jurassic Park III (2001)
programme.desc: Palaeontologist Dr Alan Grant is lured to a dinosaur-infested island by a divorced couple who offer to fund his research, unaware their real motive is to find their missing son - and that the creatures on the island are far more intelligent than anyone suspected. Action adventure sequel, starring Sam Neill, William H Macy, Tea Leoni and Alessandro Nivola

programme.title: Lethal Weapon (1987)

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop (1984)
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berkoff

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II (1987)
programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III (1994)
programme.desc: Maverick cop Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles when an investigation into a colleagues murder leads him to a Hollywood theme park. He enlists the help of old ally Rosewood to prove the resort is a cover for a major counterfeiting ring connected to a terrorist conspiracy. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Theresa Randle and Bronson Pinchot.

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)

programme.title: Ghostbusters (1984)
programme.desc: Three eccentric scientists put their hi-tech gadgetry and knowledge of the paranormal to money-making use by setting up in business as freelance ghost catchers. A musician calls them in to investigate when she sees strange creatures in her kitchen, only to end up possessed. As the spook-hunting team members deal with an attempt to shut their operation down, they discover an evil demonic entity is being summoned into existence and it falls to them to stop this creature from destroying the world. Supernatural comedy adventure, starring Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Sigourney Weaver, Ernie Hudson and Rick Moranis

programme.title: Ghostbusters II (1989)
programme.desc: The eccentric spectre-hunters reunite to save New York from a massive river of slime generated by the citizens negativity and nasty thoughts. Meanwhile, the spirit of a 16th-century tyrant tries to return to the land of the living by possessing the body of a toddler. Sequel to the supernatural comedy, starring Bill Murray, Sigourney Weaver, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Rick Moranis and Ernie Hudson

programme.title: Ghostbusters (2016)
programme.desc: When a series of supernatural disturbances occurs in New York City, two experts in the paranormal investigate, joined by a brilliant inventor who has created an array of ghost-hunting gadgets and a public transport worker whose knowledge of the city provides vital clues to the sinister cause of the ghostly activity. Reboot of the 1980s comedy franchise, starring Kristen Wiig, Melissa McCarthy, Kate McKinnon, Leslie Jones and Chris Hemsworth

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: Birds of a Feather

However, when she calls the bank it emerges every penny she had has been spent on legal fees. In desperation, the sisters take their old friend to a car-boot sale and sell her beloved collection of designer clothes, right down to the shoes on her feet - which are snapped up by former TOWIE star Amy Childs. Sitcom, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.desc: Scottish-born actor Alan Cumming explores the picturesque Outer Hebrides of Scotland, touring the Western Isles from Barra to Stornoway on Lewis, Eriskay and the Callanish stones.

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The house holds a celebration of the centenary of the exhibition that discovered the tomb of Tutankhamen, led by the great-grandfather of the current Lord Carnarvon. Lady Carnarvon is writing a book about her husbands famous ancestor, while housekeepers Sheena and Jason are cleaning the Egyptian museum in the basement. Once the domain of the maids and footmen, it now houses replicas from the tomb of Tutankhamen and is a treasure trove that requires them to use special cleaning techniques

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Philip Serrell, Tony Wong and Micaela Sharp search Stratford-upon-Avon for items, choosing a bottle-corking machine, some lamps and old furniture in the hope of turning a profit

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Rob and Helen call upon the skills of Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull to inject some character into their bland new-build garden in Eastergate, West Sussex. They want the garden to be modern and stylish to reflect their interiors and also have space for entertaining, so task the designers to realise their dreams on a budget of £5,700

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock returns to Fareham, Leicester and Shefford to see some past transformations and find out how her work has affected the lives of the garden owners. In Fareham, Hampshire, Vanessa and Alan have continued to improve on their Mediterranean wonder with olive trees, old stone walls and a giant Scots pine. A family in Leicester explains how their garden renovation has improved their lives and a tiny plot in Shefford has now become a multi-functional garden

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team create a horticultural haven for 90-year-old grandmother Iris Insole from Barking, east London, who has found gardening difficult since the death of her husband. A new path and wildlife-friendly roses are among the features they add - along with a summer house full of memories

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: Rick visits a Suffolk bakery making artisan sourdough, he meets an old friend who sells fresh fish on the beach, and in Southwold, he discovers writer George Orwells surprising views on English cooking. Rick also cooks cabbage soup and has a go at making sushi

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson invites TV presenter Steph McGovern on a journey around Northumberland. They search for ingredients for dinner with the help of a beach foraging expert, harness the wind to try their hands at kite buggying here they enjoy beach foraging, kite buggying and go looking for tiny wildlife on a bug safari

programme.title: My Greek Kitchen
programme.desc: Tonia Buxton travels to Athens, where she rustles up Avgolemono soup - a filling chicken and rice recipe - and souvlaki, one of the Greeks favourite fast-food dishes

programme.title: Garden Rescue

A family in Leicester explains how their garden renovation has improved their lives and a tiny plot in Shefford has now become a multi-functional garden

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: A reinforced concrete fire surround is given an overhaul with the restoration of the original quarry-tiled hearth

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Chris Hull and Charlie Dimmock attempt to create a rose garden with full access for Val and Mike. They begin with creating a seamless new deck from the back of the house to the upper level of the garden. Chris design is a more traditional rose garden with the central feature being a circular brick and sandstone patio under a stunning octagonal pergola

programme.title: Lets Get Laid! (1977)
programme.desc: A former soldier is unwittingly drawn into the dangerous world of international espionage in postwar London. Saucy comedy, starring Robin Askwith, Fiona Richmond and Anthony Steel

programme.title: Sex and the Other Woman (1972)
programme.desc: Anthology of five comic tales of married men having affairs. A henpecked husband risks getting caught in the act, an accountants wife discovers her husband is sleeping with a colleague, a scheming seductress tries to break up her lovers marriage, a man has a relationship with his daughters schoolfriend, and a deceived wife gets a tip-off from a nosy neighbour. Comedy, starring Bartlett Mullins and Maggie Wright

programme.title: Dartmoor Calling
programme.desc: Documentary telling the story of how Dartmoor was saved from development so its natural beauty could be preserved and shared with the public.

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Carnarvon along with their staff turn the castle into a winter wonderland with their biggest-ever tree in the grand saloon and a festive cocktail masterclass hosted by butler Louis. Lady Carnarvon carves out some family time away from the public as she gathers loved ones around the tree for a festive get together

programme.title: Flipping Profit

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Young couple Emily and Maurices narrow new-build garden in Bristol leaves a lot to be desired. They dream of an elegant Mediterranean-inspired space to rekindle happy holiday memories. Working within a £2,500 budget Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull create a stylish, contemporary spot that brings sunshine vibes to the couples lives

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Chris Hull and Charlie Dimmock attempt to create a rose garden with full access for Val and Mike. programme.title: Commandos (1968)
programme.desc: A combined team of American and Italian troops is given just two days to take over a North African oasis for the Allies. Second World War adventure, starring Lee Van Cleef, Jack Kelly and Giampiero Albertini

programme.title: The Dirty Heroes (1967)
programme.desc: As the final battles of the Second World War rage, a band of ex-convicts embarks on a mission in occupied Holland to recover a cache of stolen diamonds and top secret Allied plans that have fallen into Nazi hands. Action adventure, starring Frederick Stafford, Daniela Bianchi, John Ireland and Curt Jurgens

programme.title: Gold (1974)
programme.desc: A South African engineer is appointed general manager of a gold mine, and exposes a conspiracy to boost the price of the ore by drilling into an underground lake beneath where the company is digging, causing a devastating flood. Action adventure based on a novel by Wilbur Smith, starring Roger Moore, Susannah York, Ray Milland, Bradford Dillman and John Gielgud

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Young couple Emily and Maurices narrow new-build garden in Bristol leaves a lot to be desired. Working within a £2,500 budget Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull create a stylish, contemporary spot that brings sunshine vibes to the couples lives

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull both come up with woodland-inspired designs for Amy and Chriss garden in Witney, Oxfordshire but before they can begin the landscapers must secure the sloping bank it sits at the bottom of

programme.title: Mary Millington: Confessions from the David Galaxy Affair (1979)
programme.desc: A seductive astrologers carefree life is brought crashing to a halt when he is accused of robbery and cannot win over the only person able to provide an alibi. He faces a possibly greater challenge in providing a woman who has never had an orgasm with the satisfaction she has long been deprived of. Sex comedy, starring Alan Lake and Diana Dors

programme.title: Secrets of a Door to Door Salesman (1973)
programme.desc: A young man gets a job as a vacuum salesman but finds that he has to fight off the advances of prospective female customers. Contains sex and nudity

programme.title: Musketeer
programme.desc: An old musketeer meets a youth and two scoundrels on the road to Paris. Short drama, starring Kevin McNally, Andrew Lewis and Charlie Allen

programme.title: Cool It, Carol! (1970)
programme.desc: A young couple journey to Swinging London in search of fame and fortune. But with work scarce, they get drawn into the seedy world of modelling and sex work. Comedy drama, starring Robin Askwith and Janet Lynn

programme.desc: Exploring the working lives of musicians working in Londons West End from 1950s Soho, jazz clubs and theatre up to the present day.

programme.desc: Following Nevilles arrest on suspicion of killing David Cartwright, DI Karen Flitcroft from the Department of Policing Standards arrives to investigate. programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: Bacchus and Gently hunt for the murderer of a woman whose body is discovered in a local church. As the investigation progresses, it turns out the victim was a waitress working at the first hostess club in Newcastle - an establishment that has greatly upset the local religious community. Martin Shaw and Lee Ingleby star, with guest appearances by Brendan Coyle (Lark Rise to Candleford) and Mark Williams (The Fast Show)

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The ecclesiastical sleuths services are called upon when a medieval murder is committed at a battle re-enactment. Crime drama, starring Mark Williams, Tom Chambers and Claudie Blakey

programme.title: Father Brown

programme.title: Father Brown

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The crime-solving cleric investigates when murder threatens to derail the live broadcast of agricultural radio drama, The Muckles. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams, with Martin Jarvis and Rosalind Ayres

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: An energy tycoon hires Frank and Lu to keep an eye on his daughters, one of whom is going off the rails and the other is about to get married - but things quickly get out of hand

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: Crime drama about star rookie police officer Sabrina Sohal, who must grapple with the limits of the justice system as she fights to exonerate her falsely-accused politician father and serve her diverse hometown. programme.title: Father Brown

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Neville receives an anonymous letter telling them a murder is about to be committed. Not long after, he and Naomi are called to the harbour when a body is pulled from the ocean. The victim suffered blunt trauma and it is soon suggested that his disgruntled wife may be a person of interest. Marlon returns after taking a short holiday following his disappointing exam results. Sun-kissed detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Ginny Holder

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: The chefs culinary travels take him through Mexico City, and Puebla, where he samples Mexicos most iconic dish, the meat stew mole. Later, in the deserts of Oaxaca, he discovers how one of the countrys most famous drinks, mezcal is made

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A man wanted for serious sexual offences is apprehended in Progreso, and agents intercept a group of migrants moments after they cross the Rio Grande river

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers in Hidalgo seize over 200 kilos of methamphetamine concealed in a car, and the hunt is on in Detroit for some invasive insects which could destroy the US timber industry

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: Speed freak Guy Martin embarks on a mission to fly using muscle power alone, by building the worlds fastest human-powered aircraft. He heads to Southampton University where, in 1961, Derek Piggot became the first man to fly under his own power. Guy teams up with a group of engineers from the same university to build a plane that Guy will ride like a bicycle - will he manage to fly into the record books?

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May take a look at increasingly popular tall hatchbacks known as crossovers. Having concluded their primary appeal is to caravanners, the duo spend a couple of days in models by Mazda and Volkswagen and try to get a feel for what life is like for the people they believe would buy one. Meanwhile, Richard Hammond drives a pair of exciting Lamborghinis in Italy - the ferocious Aventador Roadster and the limited-edition Sesto Elemento, which carries an eye-watering price tag of around £2million. Two cars are also put through their paces on the test track, with James in a modern re-creation of the classic Porsche 911 and Aerosmith frontman Steven Tyler in the rather less exotic Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson drives the Jaguar F-Type sports car on some of Britains finest roads, while Richard Hammond jumps inside the Range Rover Sport and gives it a thorough workout off-road, on a track and in what he believes is its most natural habitat - the lanes of Cheshire. James May goes for a countryside adventure in the New Routemaster London bus brought into use in 2013, which is propelled by a turbodiesel generator and a powerful electric motor. Inspired by the machines they have tested, the trio then meet to celebrate Britains motor industry with a grand finale in front of Buckingham Palace. Plus, former Formula One driver Mark Webber takes to the track for a lap in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers demonstrate how to make gourmet food without breaking the bank. They begin with a few weekend treats, rustling up several delicious dishes, gleaning money-saving secrets at the UKs only pub with two Michelin stars and finding out how beer can be as good a match with food as wine. Everything they learn will be put to the test when they help a wounded soldier say thank you to some very important people with a surprise barbecue

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: For Mexicans, their most revered dishes come from the south, and their Mecca is Oaxaca, where locals still dress in traditional costume. Rick explores the home of Mexicos national cheese, Queso Oaxacana. Its also a land where vanilla grows wild and cacao orchards are harvested to make superb chocolate

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Guests Fern Britton, Stephen Mangan, Ken Livingstone and Reginald D Hunter join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the comedy panel show in which contestants try to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Rob Brydon presents

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Maisie Adam, Rory Bremner, James Cracknell and Michelle Gayle go toe-to-toe testing their general knowledge skills in a variety of trivia-based games. Their scores are tallied across the week resulting in an overall champion

Actor Reece Shearsmith helps test gizmos for dealing with snow, fog and long nights, comedian Robert Webb introduces technology that turns a smartphone into a breathalyser, as well as a pitch-shifting karaoke machine to improve carol singing, and actress Jessica Hynes assists one of Richards tasters for his festive feast

programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams of celebs try to call each others bluff with a few stories about themselves that might be true or might be out-and-out porkies. programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon introduces a seasonal special of the comedy panel game. programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister and Rimmer finally arrive back on Earth, only to discover they have slipped through a time hole into a period where everything occurs backwards. Sci-fi space comedy, starring Chris Barrie and Craig Charles

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The ship is on a collision course with five black holes and Holly recommends that the crew members abandon Red Dwarf and regroup after the danger is over. Cat and Kryten take off in Blue Midget, while Lister and Rimmer make their escape in Starbug, but are marooned when it is hit by a meteor and crash lands on an icy planet. Starring Chris Barrie and Craig Charles

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: A grotesque, salivating genetic mutant goes on the rampage aboard the ship, spreading terror and stealing the crews emotions, leaving Lister without fear and Rimmer with no anger. Sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles and Frances Barber

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucys discussion about whether they should have another child descends into psychological warfare. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy think they have bought the perfect Christmas present for seven-year old Charlie and five-year-old twins Benji and Molly. However, their pride in their parenting is short-lived when the youngsters grandparents buy exactly the same gift and beat them to the punch by handing it over on Christmas Eve. Lee ventures into the streets on the night before Christmas and faces a desperate race against time to find a suitable replacement. Lee Mack and Sally Bretton star in a festive episode of the sitcom

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through some of the most remote landscapes on Earth. He begins in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, encountering thick jungles and tropical swamps as he looks for the people and wildlife whose home is Africas greatest rainforest. His first destination is the remote village of Baka, where Simon experiences a culture based on sharing resources and respecting all living things in the rainforest

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through Patagonia at the foot of the South American continent, a beautiful and rugged land of mountains, ice and endless wild grasslands, His journey takes him up to the huge South Patagonian ice field, through the foothills of the Andes towards the great Grey Glacier of eastern Chile. In Taibo and Jauny, Simon encounters two gauchos, the cowboys of South America, who live isolated lives in the mountains, tending their livestock and braving the storms in a simple hut for months on end

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon voyages across the Coral Triangle, a huge wilderness of tropical seas and jungle clad islands in the south-western Pacific, surrounded by the Philippines, Malaysia and Indonesia. It is one of the most beautiful and biodiverse corners of the words oceans and is crucial to the health of the wider marine environment, having been described as the Amazon of the seas

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels across the Kalahari desert in southern Africa, one of the continents last great unspoilt wildernesses. He begins his journey in a small village in Namibias Nyae Nyae conservancy, where he sets out on a hunt for wildebeest with San trackers, who still live in the traditional way. After weeks of dusty travel, Simon ends his journey in the Okavango Delta, where seasonal rains turn the desert in to a vast oasis of greenery

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through some of the most remote landscapes on Earth. programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through Patagonia at the foot of the South American continent, a beautiful and rugged land of mountains, ice and endless wild grasslands, His journey takes him up to the huge South Patagonian ice field, through the foothills of the Andes towards the great Grey Glacier of eastern Chile. In Taibo and Jauny, Simon encounters two gauchos, the cowboys of South America, who live isolated lives in the mountains, tending their livestock and braving the storms in a simple hut for months on end

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon voyages across the Coral Triangle, a huge wilderness of tropical seas and jungle clad islands in the south-western Pacific, surrounded by the Philippines, Malaysia and Indonesia. It is one of the most beautiful and biodiverse corners of the words oceans and is crucial to the health of the wider marine environment, having been described as the Amazon of the seas

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels across the Kalahari desert in southern Africa, one of the continents last great unspoilt wildernesses. He begins his journey in a small village in Namibias Nyae Nyae conservancy, where he sets out on a hunt for wildebeest with San trackers, who still live in the traditional way. After weeks of dusty travel, Simon ends his journey in the Okavango Delta, where seasonal rains turn the desert in to a vast oasis of greenery

programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough swims alongside sea otters, discovering he is no match for their natural agility in the water, while in Florida he takes a dip with manatees for the first time and observes their feeding habits. programme.title: The Life of Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough profiles the tree-dwellers of the animal kingdom, as primates, bats and squirrels perform complicated manoeuvres in the worlds forests. programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee is worried that the woman of his dreams is drifting farther away - and admits his fears to Toby over a few drinks in the bar. Can his neighbour give him the advice he needs to win Lucys heart once and for all? Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Hugh Dennis, with Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee wins £1,000 for writing an essay entitled Disability in the Workplace, and Lucy is moved to tears by his sensitivity. However, Tim remains unconvinced, and his scepticism pays off when the journalist who turns up to cover the story is shocked to find an able-bodied author. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Tim Vine

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the comedy. Gary and Dermot worry about who will moving into the newly vacant flat above them, but their fears prove unfounded when it turns out to be an attractive blonde

programme.desc: Harry Enfields established comedy favourites, including forgetful pub landlord Les Norris, DJ dinosaurs Smashie n Nicey and Wayne and Waynetta Slob, drowning in pizza boxes

programme.desc: Joe Maplin commissions a statue of himself and issues strict instructions for the unveiling - paving the way for more chaos and confusion at the holiday camp. Comedy, starring Simon Cadell and Paul Shane

programme.desc: Crafty con Fletcher helps new inmate Godber settle in by giving him a few lessons on coping with prison life. First episode of the classic comedy, originally broadcast in 1974, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Boycie faces his worst nightmare when Marlenes sister decides to pay a visit from Peckham. As if the man-eating glamourpuss was not enough to cope with, he finds all his staff tied up in the barn - and realises his past has come back to haunt him. Guest starring Paula Wilcox

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Mr Lucas decides hes been to his grannys funeral once too often, and instead feigns illness so he can take the day off to visit his girlfriend. Department store comedy, with Mollie Sugden, Nicholas Smith and Trevor Bannister

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: In Which Romance Isnt Dead - Just Incompetent
programme.desc: Barry tries to play matchmaker when he discovers that his neighbour Chislehurst is desperately lonely. However, the task soon proves difficult, and Barry quickly discovers that elegible women are hard to come by. Long-running comedy, starring Mike Grady and Tyler Butterworth

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Mischievous Tinkle in Howards Eyes
programme.desc: Howard hopes to revolutionise the animal-watching community by introducing mobile phones to their repertoire of tools. However, he quickly discovers the gadget is not exactly suited to the silent nature of the hobby, and tries to find another way to contact his friends. Sitcom, starring Robert Fyfe

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Martin organises a fundraising dance, and suspects that Paul will sabotage his arrangements. Comedy, starring Richard Briers, Peter Egan and Penelope Wilton. First broadcast February 26, 1984

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Crafty con Fletcher helps new inmate Godber settle in by giving him a few lessons on coping with prison life. First episode of the classic comedy, originally broadcast in 1974, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth press-gangs a reluctant Richard into helping repair the lights at the local church hall. Comedy, starring Patricia Routledge and Clive Swift

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the classic comedy about the Home Guard, starring Arthur Lowe and John Le Mesurier. Bank manager George Mainwaring responds to the call to set up a Local Defence Volunteers platoon in the town of Walmington-on-Sea on the south coast of England, assembling a motley crew of locals to protect Britain from Nazi invasion. programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee is worried that the woman of his dreams is drifting farther away - and admits his fears to Toby over a few drinks in the bar. programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy has her god-daughter dumped on her overnight, which wouldnt be so bad except the girls stay coincides with her birthday - leaving the inexperienced guardian and her flatmate Lee struggling to come up with appropriate entertainment for a bunch of excited nine-year-olds. Lee Mack and Sally Bretton star, with a guest appearance by Paul Kaye (Game of Thrones)

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot and Gary get serious over a chess contest in which the victor gains an evening of pleasure. Laddish comedy, starring Martin Clunes and Leslie Ash

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: A hypnotist is booked to provide the entertainment at the triplets baptism - and Agnes soon finds herself under his spell. Meanwhile, the matriarchs kitchen is falling apart - but that turns out to be the least of her problems when son Mark delivers some heartbreaking news. Hit comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll as the foul-mouthed mother-of-six

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del encounters an old flame from almost 20 years previously, and Rodney experiences the joys of dating - but the brothers soon face awkward questions from the past. David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst star, with Diane Langton (The Rag Trade)

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del and Rodney mourn Grandads death, and feel gratified to see such a good turn-out of friends and relatives at his funeral - even if most people are more interested in the food afterwards. However, one of the guests, a certain long-lost seafaring uncle, ends up outstaying his welcome. Long-running comedy, introducing Buster Merryfield to the cast as Uncle Albert

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Uncle Albert has a nasty fall into the cellar at the Nags Head, but turns his injury into a profit-making opportunity - eagerly egged on by wheeler-dealer Del-Boy. Vintage comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Rodney aspires to be a pop star, taking on the role of the drumless drummer in Mental Mickeys band but, not surprisingly, Del-Boy manages to ruin his chances. With a guest appearance by DJ Mike Read, alongside David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: The Trotters agree to dog-sit while Boycie and Marlene go on holiday, and happily tuck into the fresh meat lovingly provided for their charge, scarcely suspecting what lies ahead. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del pays a stripper to attend a party at the Nags Head with Rodney, who has been bet by Mickey Pearce that he cannot find a date for the occasion. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del snatches a chance to make a quick profit, leaving gullible Denzil stripped of his redundancy money. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del-Boy becomes a yuppie, complete with red braces, Filofax and chrome briefcase. Meanwhile, Rodney begins attending a computer course at night school, where he meets Cassandra. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Dodgy dealer Del gets his hands on a consignment of self-inflating rubber dolls, which turn out to be filled with explosive gas. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: A retired jeweller offers Del-Boy the deal of a lifetime - then suddenly has a heart attack and gets taken to hospital with a briefcase containing 250 cut-price gold necklaces still chained to his wrist. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del enters one of Rodneys old paintings in a competition and is over the moon when he wins a holiday for three at a five-star hotel in Majorca. Soon after, the Trotter brothers and Cassandra arrive at Palma Airport - but Del-Boy reveals there is a slight snag. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Gwyneth Strong

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Dels beloved mum apparently makes contact during a seance at the Nags Head, inspiring him to visit the doctor to seek treatment for stomach cramps. Admitted to hospital for tests, he fears there is something seriously wrong with him - but a bacon sandwich and an alcoholic drink smuggled in by Rodney soon put the smile back on his face. Comedy, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Rodney ties the knot with Cassandra, but Del has more on his mind than best man duties as the dreaded Driscoll brothers arrive at the Nags Head baying for his blood over some stolen mobile phones. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Gwyneth Strong

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: Richie and Eddies nocturnal peace is disturbed by a violent encounter with a burglar - resulting in the intruders sack of loot falling into their sticky hands. Paul Bradley guests, with Adrian Edmondson and Rik Mayall

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: After inheriting £600 the duo head off for a night at the fair. Richies wallet is stolen, but that proves to be the least of his problems as a fortune teller declares that he is going to die in three nights time. Rik Mayall and Adrian Edmondson star

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Rodney aspires to be a pop star, taking on the role of the drumless drummer in Mental Mickeys band but, not surprisingly, Del-Boy manages to ruin his chances. With a guest appearance by DJ Mike Read, alongside David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Raquel invites her estranged parents around for dinner, and Del-Boy is keen to make an impression - but a mix-up with the gravy boat puts a damper on proceedings. However, things soon take a turn for the better when Dels father-in-law finds an old watch among the Trotters junk, which he claims could net them a pretty packet at auction. But nothing can quite prepare them for the shock they have in store. The final part of the Christmas 1996 trilogy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.desc: Del-Boy becomes a yuppie, complete with red braces, Filofax and chrome briefcase. Meanwhile, Rodney begins attending a computer course at night school, where he meets Cassandra. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del pays a stripper to attend a party at the Nags Head with Rodney, who has been bet by Mickey Pearce that he cannot find a date for the occasion. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del snatches a chance to make a quick profit, leaving gullible Denzil stripped of his redundancy money. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: Richie and Eddies nocturnal peace is disturbed by a violent encounter with a burglar - resulting in the intruders sack of loot falling into their sticky hands. Paul Bradley guests, with Adrian Edmondson and Rik Mayall

programme.title: Bottom
programme.desc: After inheriting £600 the duo head off for a night at the fair. Richies wallet is stolen, but that proves to be the least of his problems as a fortune teller declares that he is going to die in three nights time. Rik Mayall and Adrian Edmondson star

programme.title: Toast of London
programme.desc: Tired of doing voiceover work and appearing on stage every night, Steven hires a new agent and tries his hand at a different career - an author of erotic literature. He also finds himself a glamorous woman, who would be perfect for him if only they could find a moment in private. Comedy, starring Matt Berry

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The Shipmans drive to Wales for the wedding fayre, and after a momentous trip to the church for the reading of the banns, Nessa tells Stacey her big secret. Comedy, starring Mathew Horne and Joanna Page

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The bride-to-be goes on a hen party, while Gavin embarks on two stag nights, the second of which reveals shocking secrets about his fiancee that could jeopardise the wedding. Elsewhere, the early return of Staceys brother Jason horrifies Uncle Bryn. Comedy, starring Mathew Horne and Joanna Page

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Its the night shift for the junior doctors. Adrians ego takes a hit as he bites off more than he can chew, and Ese must solve the mystery of a patients unexplained collapse

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis interviews some of the biggest names in UK entertainment and is granted exclusive access into their lives at home and at work, beginning with platinum-selling rapper Stormzy. After two years out of the spotlight, Stormzy welcomes Louis into his home in south-west London to sit down for a frank and revealing conversation that covers many aspects of his life; from his childhood to the breakdown of a high-profile relationship, and the pressures that come with being one of the countrys best-loved musicians and role models

programme.title: Dangerous Breed: Crime. Cons. Cats.

programme.desc: Pete helps a withdrawn pregnant Malinois regain strength so she can care for her 11 lively pups, and falls for Winter, a Staffie who is covered in scars

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
